| [The Difference Between the Material Mind and the Soul Mind](messages/2015/10/2015-10-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑12 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a structured teaching on the two distinct forms of consciousness within every person: the material mind, developed through intellect and sensory perception, and the soul mind, which lies largely dormant until ignited by Divine Love. He explains that the natural love path perfects the spiritual mind, while the Divine Love path expands the soul mind into an ever-deepening comprehension of God's creation that continues for all eternity. | The mind analyses. The soul knows. Only one of these can comprehend God. |
| [Continue to Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-12-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑12 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved assures the gathered souls that there is nothing to fear — God's Hand is firmly upon them and only Light and joy await. He calls them to trust in God's Will, pray for those around them who struggle, and release the need to control the paths of loved ones, accepting them with Love and prayer while walking in peace and faith. | When everything else is uncertain, continuing to love is always the right next step |
| [Mary Is with You](messages/2015/10/2015-10-12-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑12 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary lovingly acknowledges each person present as a channel of Divine Love and assures them that she walks with them constantly, through struggle and joy alike. She urges them to strengthen their faith by receiving God's Love and to reach out to lost souls, those seeking truth, and those in pain as they go about their daily lives. | Mary is with you in the struggle and with you when the wave of love carries you. Always. |
| [These Are the Days to Learn How to Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-augustine-2.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine encourages a group of souls who have prayed together over many years to trust one another, release their fears, and walk in Love. He assures them that the barriers to Love are universal and can be overcome, and that looking back they will see these as the days they truly learned to love — one another, and all their brothers and sisters in the world. | You are living in the very days that matter most, and learning to love is the work of these days |
| [Choose Well Your Next Steps](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 |  |  | Augustine addresses a board meeting, urging those gathered to speak honestly from their souls rather than allowing the mind's hesitations to hold them back. He affirms that God will not override free will but that the soul will confirm the rightness of each step taken, and that every person present has a unique and necessary role in spreading the truths of God's Love. | God will not tell you what to do. But your soul will confirm when you have chosen rightly. |
| [You Create Circles of Light in the World](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses the gathered group, affirming that their collective prayers and service create a Circle of Light while each individual soul radiates outward into the world. He speaks of a world crying out in pain and confusion, and of those who walk the Divine Love path as an oasis of healing and peace, together generating waves of light that will ignite the consciousness of mankind. | Together you are a Circle of Light. Individually you are waves of healing in a world that cries out. |
| [You Are Becoming God's Instruments and Channels of Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-19-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑19 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved assures the gathered souls that God carries them upon the Divine Path in a mighty flow of Love, and calls them to honor every soul as God's unique creation. He affirms that they have arrived at a place of deep faith and soul Light and are now walking as God's instruments, agents of change, and channels of Love — part of a chain of Light that flows through them and touches many souls. | Becoming a channel of Love is not a destination. It is a continuous unfolding |
| [The First Father Talks about Reincarnation and the Progression of Life](messages/2015/10/2015-10-26-af-aman.md) | Aman | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑26 |  | Core Teaching, Historical | Aman, who identifies himself as the first parent of humanity, addresses a soul who believes in reincarnation. Drawing on his thousands of years of observation in spirit, he explains that the soul incarnates once in the flesh to establish its identity, then continues its journey through many planes of spirit — each offering new experiences and growth — ultimately progressing toward the Celestial Kingdom through Divine Love. He affirms that he has never witnessed a spirit returning to flesh. | You incarnate once, and that one life sets the trajectory of an eternal journey |
| [Guidance about Our Choices in the Flow of God's Love](messages/2015/10/2015-10-26-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑26 |  |  | Faith teaches that belief is of the mind and therefore irrelevant to the deeper soul-to-soul connection that is true love in action. She calls the group to release judgment of others, to correct by example rather than instruction, and to pray confidently for those they love who struggle, trusting that God's Hand rests upon every soul being lifted in prayer. | Belief is of the mind. Love is of the soul. Only one of them changes anything. |
| [So Many in the Unseen World Benefit from Your Prayers Together](messages/2015/10/2015-10-26-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑10‑26 |  |  | Seretta Kem reveals the unseen dimensions of a Divine Love prayer circle, describing how thousands of spirits in the lower spheres gather in concentric circles around those praying, drawn by the Light and taught by celestial spirits. He encourages the group by assuring them that their prayers serve many more souls than they can see, both in the flesh and in spirit, and that the celestials are like midwives supporting the rebirthing of their souls in Love. | Your prayers reach into the spirit world and bring healing to souls you will never meet in this life |
| [Free Will Governs Your Path](messages/2015/11/2015-11-02-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches on the nature of free will, explaining that every day presents choices that lead either toward Light or toward pain. He assures the group that as their souls grow in discernment, choices become clearer and less cluttered with fear and judgment. He acknowledges the struggle of human life with compassion, affirming that the human conditions are gradually being burnt away by God's Love and that celestial spirits walk alongside them always. | Free will is not a burden. It is the dignity God gave you to choose Love |
| [Release the Yoke of Error and Lack of Self Love](messages/2015/11/2015-11-02-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved blesses those who continue to rise above the conditions of the world and encourages them to release the parts within themselves that are of error and pain. He describes how God's Love heals wounds, awakens the soul's faculties, and breaks the chain of error passed from generation to generation — calling each soul to shout 'I am Loved' and walk boldly toward the Light. | The yoke you are carrying was never meant for you. It can be laid down |
| [Seretta Kem Speaks to a Beginners Group](messages/2015/11/2015-11-02-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑02 |  |  | Seretta Kem welcomes a group of newer seekers, teaching that the soul's longing drew them to prayer and community long before the mind could explain why. He affirms that knowledge and truth come in time, but the soul's desire must come first, and that this longing will carry each soul forward for all eternity as God's Love ignites their gifts and draws others to them. | Your soul found this Light before your mind knew what it was looking for. |
| [Persist in Your Faith in Bringing about Centers of Light in the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-09-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑09 |  | Spirit Biography | Faith opens with a prayer to God on behalf of the group before addressing their discouragement about the difficult work of establishing Centers of Light in the world. Drawing on her own Earth life experience of struggling to be heard while doing God's work, she calls them to persist through setbacks and narrow thinking, assuring them that spirits are actively clearing the path and that God's Will cannot ultimately be thwarted. | God's Will cannot be thwarted. Keep going. |
| [Healing for This Precious World Is Required](messages/2015/11/2015-11-09-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑09 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Francis of Assisi opens by describing a quiet moment with the medium in the garden, then calls the gathered souls to bring healing, beauty, Love and Light to a world that struggles in darkness. He speaks of coming changes to the Earth — disruptions and adjustments necessary for the survival of all creatures — and assures those present that with the eyes and ears of their souls they will guide many through these changes as God's channels of Love. | The world is not beyond healing, but it needs souls willing to be instruments of that healing |
| [Do Not Hide Away but Express Your Gifts in the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-16-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑16 |  |  | Alec Gaunt reveals he has been closely present with many in the group, working to open doors for each one and nurture their individual gifts. He calls them to set aside reluctance, shyness, and fear of judgment and step boldly into the world as God's channels of Love — expressing their unique gifts not out of pride but because hiding them inhibits their own growth and withholds blessings from many others. | Hiding your gifts is not humility. It is withholding blessings from those who need them |
| [Creating a Lattice of Light in the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-16-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑16 | Awakening Humanity, Letters from History | Core Teaching | Confucius reveals that a vast network of souls is being connected through prayer, forming a lattice of Light in the world through which God's blessings flow freely. He teaches that much of this service happens on levels the soul is not yet consciously aware of, and encourages the group to include all known members of this network in their prayers as God weaves each thread into a beautiful and important tapestry. | Every prayer is a thread. Together you are weaving a net of light around the world. |
| [Be Joyful and Do Not Let the Worries of the World Affect You](messages/2015/11/2015-11-16-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑16 |  |  | Goldie brings a warm and lighthearted blessing, urging the group not to dwell in pain or circular worry but to call on her for help, promising laughter, joy, and a lighter perspective on life's concerns. She reminds them that so much of what we worry about is trivial, and that loving God with a full heart makes every burden feel lighter. | Call on her when the burden is too heavy. She will make you laugh. |
| [It Shall Start in the West and Move Around the World](messages/2015/11/2015-11-23-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑23 |  | Prophecy, Core Teaching | Jesus blesses each soul who chooses the Divine Path, assuring them that God walks with them and designates an angel to each one. He reflects on his own struggles to be heard during his Earth life and affirms that God's Will is never thwarted. He declares that this message of Love will start in the West and encompass the world, calling those present to be clear, humble channels of Love — plumbing the depths of their souls rather than letting their minds prescribe what service looks like. | The awakening of humanity has already begun, and it started where you are standing |
| [Professor Salyards Affirms the Truth Spoken by King Solomon](messages/2015/11/2015-11-23-af-professor-salyards.md) | Professor Salyards | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑23 |  |  | Professor Salyards, known through the Padgett messages, follows Solomon to confirm that true wisdom and the ability to perceive spiritual truth can only come through the soul faculties opened by Divine Love. He encourages the group to redouble their prayers, promising that as these faculties open they will become credible and inspiring teachers of truth to the world. | Solomon said it first. Salyards confirms it: the soul sees what the intellect can never reach. |
| [King Solomon Talks about How to Obtain True Wisdom](messages/2015/11/2015-11-23-af-solomon.md) | Solomon | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑23 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Solomon, now a Celestial Angel, reflects on the difference between the intellectual wisdom he was famous for in his Earth life and the true wisdom that comes only from a soul ignited by God's Love. He teaches that even those new to the Divine Love path have access to a deeper knowing than any purely intellectual understanding can provide. | The wisest man who ever lived has come to tell you his wisdom was wrong. |
| [Guidance and Reassurance Regarding Creating Centres of Light](messages/2015/11/2015-11-25-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑25 | Service & Mission |  | Augustine responds to a request for guidance on establishing Centres of Light, teaching that resistance and complexity are signs to wait and pray rather than force, and that negative forces will always attempt to oppose where Light is being planted. He urges patience, love, and persistent prayer as the tools that will ultimately clear every obstacle and bring God's Will to fruition. | When the door stays shut, pray harder. God's Will cannot ultimately be blocked. |
| [Be Warriors of Light](messages/2015/11/2015-11-25-af-white-cloud.md) | White Cloud | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑25 |  |  | White Cloud honours the many souls drawn to a long-established Circle of Light and calls those present to be warriors of Light in the world, expressing God's Love through every avenue and gift available to them. He teaches that words alone do not move souls — only Love permeating every action can stop the tide of darkness and bring healing and truth to a yearning humanity. | Not words. Not arguments. A life so full of love that souls shift simply by standing near you. |
| [You Cannot See the Events Coming but Have Faith That God Will Use You](messages/2015/11/2015-11-26-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑26 |  |  | Augustine explains why celestial spirits do not reveal the full scope of what lies ahead, teaching that foreknowledge would distort rather than assist the free flow of human choices in harmony with God's Plan. He calls the group to stay grounded in daily prayer, love, and patience, trusting that God carries them and will reveal what is needed at the right moment. | God withholds the future not to hide it, but to keep your choices free. |
| [On Being a Channel of God's Love: What It Is and What It Is Not](messages/2015/11/2015-11-26-af-simon.md) | Simon | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑26 | Service & Mission | Core Teaching | Simon delivers a clear teaching on what it truly means to be a channel of God's Love, distinguishing soul development and rapport with God from ego-driven assumptions about vocation, titles, and plans. He teaches that the most effective channel is one who is simply present with God, unencumbered by the mind's need to direct or claim ownership of what Love accomplishes. | It is not your vocation or your title that makes you a channel of love. It is what lives in your soul. |
| [Walk in the World as Loving Channels to One Another](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 |  |  | Alec Gaunt adds his encouragement to the group, affirming that surprising turns of events await those who continue riding the wave of God's Love and pursuing His work in the world. He holds up a vision of what the world would be if all people could trust, give, and share with one another in love, and calls each soul to walk in the world as a loving channel acknowledging the beauty and uniqueness of every person they meet. | What if every soul acknowledged every other in their beauty? That is what the world is meant to be. |
| [Prayer to Bring Freedom and Joy](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 |  |  | Confucius offers a beautiful prayer to the Heavenly Father on behalf of those gathered, asking that their burdens be lifted, that they be freed from the shackles of earthly conditions, and that they be uplifted into glorious Light and the joy of God's presence within. | Prayer is not an obligation. It is the most direct path to freedom and joy |
| [The Power of Prayer to Bring Change and Healing](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 |  |  | Faith marvels at the power generated by a large gathering of souls praying together, teaching that sincere prayer and soul-longing for God's Love brings real change both in the world and the spirit realm. She assures the group that no hurt, pain, or dilemma is insurmountable through this Love, and calls them to the simplicity of prayer as the one act that opens everything. | No explanation needed. Just longing. Just prayer. Just an ocean of Love waiting for you. |
| [God's Grace Is Here](messages/2015/11/2015-11-28-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2015‑11‑28 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus welcomes a gathered group into the Circle of Light, blessing them with the assurance of God's immediate presence and love. He calls them to open their souls to receive the inflowing of God's Grace, likening it to waves of Living Waters washing through their being and carrying them above the conditions of the world. | Open your soul. The Living Waters are already here. |

She promises that as they grow more attuned to God and their souls, a real and powerful cooperation with the angels will develop, and their gifts will ignite to bring healing, teaching, and peace to many. She calls them to acknowledge their own beauty and see the world through eyes of Love and compassion. | Every Circle of Light you form sends ripples of healing far beyond what you can see |

He calls them to embrace all souls with tolerance and acceptance regardless of their beliefs or philosophies, assuring them that God will open door after door as they travel the world connecting with other circles of Light in God's great plan to bring healing and harmony to the Earth. | When souls join hands in prayer, they share not just intention but their very being |

You are the one holding the rope. |

He reassures those who feel fear about what that purpose might require, promising that walking in God's Will brings not devastation but peace, strength, and a love beyond what the mind can currently imagine. | God placed your purpose within you before you were born. It is still there, waiting. |

He teaches that spirits cannot do this preparation for those gathered — it requires the free will choice of each individual to step forward in passionate and consistent dedication to the path. | The time for casual commitment is over. He calls each soul to open to God as a flower opens to the sun, trusting that in this simple act they are bonded to one another and to God in powerful and wondrous ways. | Many roads brought you here. He calls the circle to release mind-driven willfulness, seek the deeper consciousness of the soul, and become beacons of God's reality as the world stands on the verge of great change. | You cannot know God's Will from your mind. You can only know it from your soul |

He warns of great and surprising changes coming and calls them to hold firm to their path without compromise, letting love inform every thought, word, and action. | The world's heart softens at Christmas. | [Allow the Love in Your Souls to Open Many Doors](messages/2015/12/2015-12-27-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑27 |  |  | Alec Gaunt encourages the group to embrace and pray for all who serve as God's instruments of Light in the world, regardless of whether their beliefs align with those of the circle. He teaches that the soul's expression always matters more than the mind's understanding, and calls those gathered to release the fear and willfulness that restrict love from flowing freely through them into the world. | Fear and wilfulness are the locks. Love is the key. Your soul has always known this. |
| [Awakening of the Soul Mind](messages/2015/12/2015-12-27-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑27 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine describes a gift given to the circle to strengthen their ability to distinguish between soul perception and mind perception, teaching that as Divine Love deepens, the soul mind comes into focus like clearing vision, bringing a truer and more powerful awareness of God and reality. | The soul mind is awakening within you, like a newborn whose vision is blurry but becoming clear |
| [Awakening of the Soul Mind](messages/2015/12/2015-12-27-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑27 | Letters from History, Mind & Soul |  | Confucius announces that something new is dawning for the group — a place of inner knowing where the mind no longer doubts but opens to God's guidance and the soul takes ascendency. He calls them to accept the coming changes with joy, assuring them that this awakening will bring serene strength, effortless service, and the full blossoming of what has long been budding within. | The flower has been budding for so long. Now it is beginning to bloom. |
| [The Time Comes for You to Express These Gifts](messages/2015/12/2015-12-28-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑28 | Prism of the Soul |  | Keea Atta Kem tells the group that the time has come to stop standing at the threshold and step fully into the flow of God's Love. She calls them to release judgment and division between themselves, to walk together in unity, and to open the mighty river of soul gifts within them to a world starving for spiritual nourishment. | There is a mighty river in your soul. Let go of the judgment that is holding back the flood. |
| [Look Forward to New Opportunities in the Coming Year](messages/2015/12/2015-12-30-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2015‑12‑30 |  |  | Alec Gaunt looks ahead to the new year, encouraging the group that surprising doors will open and challenges will arise, but that both are gifts for soul growth. He teaches that God does not send adversity but that the conditions of the world bring inevitable challenges through which the soul learns, and that the year ahead holds deep communion with God, greater clarity of purpose, and a fuller revelation of each soul's true self. | Surprises, challenges, and deeper communion with God. The year ahead has all three. |
| [Accepting the New Awarenesses of an Opening Soul](messages/2016/01/2016-01-04-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑04 | Mind & Soul | Core Teaching | Confucius teaches that the great challenge of the spiritual life is allowing the soul to come into direct communication with the mind, dissolving the filters and prejudices that obstruct true perception. He assures the circle that as this merging of awarenesses deepens through God's Love, they will see both the beauty of God's Creation and the darkness of man's, yet remain anchored and unswayed by the power of Divine Love within them. | There may be nothing between your mind and your soul - a merging of consciousness |
| [On Being a Comforter in This World](messages/2016/01/2016-01-04-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑04 | Service & Mission, Healing Path |  | Seretta Kem guides a newly formed healing group, teaching that the impulse to heal the world must originate in the soul rather than the mind. He cautions that mental constructs and dogmatic ideas about how the work should look lower the group's resonance and, through the Law of Attraction, draw in lesser influences. He calls each person to a simple, single purpose - to be a channel of God's Love and healing with every breath - and assures them that even a few souls living this way can change the world. | Your longing to heal the world is real. But ask where it begins - in the mind that wants to plan it, or the soul that simply loves. |
| [Encouragement from Jesus](messages/2016/01/2016-01-08-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑08 | Jesus Speaks, Service & Mission |  | Jesus offers encouragement to a small group, opening in prayer and then assuring them that great changes and opportunities await as they commit themselves to God's plan. He tells them their souls already sense what is to come, that they will teach and serve as vanguards carrying God's Love and healing to those in darkness, and that doors will open in the perfect timing of God's Will. He promises he is with them always and that all they do will come to reflect this Love. | Your soul already knows what is coming. The joy you feel is the anticipation of a door God has not yet opened. |
| [You Are Gardeners in God's Beautiful Garden](messages/2016/01/2016-01-09-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑09 | Service & Mission |  | Augustine celebrates the community's growth and faithfulness, describing them as gardeners who, together with the angels and God, have brought a beautiful flower to bloom. He encourages them to continue planting seeds of love wherever God inspires, assuring them that what seems like simple effort will bring wondrous blessing to the world and that their bonds of love will become a great channel for God. | What you think of as tending a small garden, God sees as the beginning of a paradise. |
| [Your Beautiful Souls Are Eager](messages/2016/01/2016-01-09-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑09 | Service & Mission, Prism of the Soul |  | Confucius celebrates the community's eagerness and love for one another as they enter a new era of service, affirming that each soul carries unique and wondrous gifts waiting to be discovered and expressed in the world. He urges each one to act upon the guidance they receive from God, promising that as they do they will fulfill their purpose and become true instruments of Light and change. | The gifts you are waiting to discover are already inside you, already eager to be found. |
| [The Simple Journey Awaits](messages/2016/01/2016-01-09-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑09 | Service & Mission, Mind & Soul |  | Faith affirms how dramatically the circle has shifted over the past year as God's Love has drawn them from willful, fearful striving into humble surrender and soul-led trust. She assures them that no impressive structures or grand organizations are needed, only a commitment to reach for God together, and that as they release mental expectations they will be carried forward in deep peace, unshakable confidence, and joyful service. | The work of God needs no grand structures. It needs only your willingness to let go and reach. |
| [The Year Ahead](messages/2016/01/2016-01-11-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑11 | Service & Mission, Awakening Humanity |  | Matthew speaks of the year to come, foretelling rapid inner awakenings, unexpected travels, and many encounters with seeking souls of differing beliefs. He urges the circle to embrace all without prejudice, to make love the currency of their lives and the focus of their mission, and to pray often in preparation, promising that what flows from their efforts will astonish them. | This year you will do the things you fear you cannot do, carried by a Love that asks no passport and speaks every language. |
| [The Path You Walk Together](messages/2016/01/2016-01-13-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑13 | Service & Mission |  | Andrew affirms that God has drawn the circle together through their shared soul longings and is opening a new chapter of purpose, service, and deeper soul expression for each of them. He urges them not to worry over material provision, to let the soul inform the mind, to act whenever they feel God's Love coursing through them, and to let love dissolve every barrier between them so they may work in true harmony as brothers and sisters. | Stop asking how and when and where. Feel the Love move through you, and act. That is the only signal you need. |
| [Blessed Are You Who Seek to Be a Channel of Love](messages/2016/01/2016-01-16-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑16 | Jesus Speaks, Service & Mission |  | Jesus blesses those gathered as they prepare to serve, teaching that the deepest work is wordless — a loving Light embracing another soul through prayer and presence. He assures them that as they touch the souls who hunger, they themselves will be touched, and that their eager longing to be channels of Love will be answered by God with wisdom, joy, and peace that sets them irrevocably upon the path of at-onement. | The most powerful thing you will do today needs no words at all. |
| [How the Gift of Love Can Touch a Soul and Change the World](messages/2016/01/2016-01-18-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑18 | Service & Mission, Awakening Humanity |  | Confucius teaches that the Divine Love within an awakened soul is itself an active agent, reaching and igniting longing in other souls like a tolling bell, even without a word spoken. He calls this instrumentality the greatest of all gifts and the one that will change the world, urging the circle to nurture it through prayer, to release their willful resistance, and to choose the path of becoming God's clear and vibrant channels of Love. | You may never say a word. The Love in your soul rings like a bell, and souls you will never meet turn toward the sound. |
| [Mary Will Be with You in Your Prayers](messages/2016/01/2016-01-18-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑18 |  |  | Mary blesses those gathered with God's peace, promising to be present with them and a host of angels as they pray and visit a soul in need. She affirms that each carries a mission to bring comfort, Light, and the embrace of God's Love, and that this work of loving prayer is God's Will. | When you go to comfort another, you do not go alone. Mary and a host of angels go with you. |
| [The Power of Prayer](messages/2016/01/2016-01-23-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑23 |  | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that prayer is the foundation and anchor of the soul's walk as a channel of God's Love, opening the connection through which His Love, guidance, and the angels flow. He distinguishes true prayer — a sincere longing from the very centre of the soul — from mere recitation of the mind, explaining that it is this longing that elicits God's response, unlocks the soul's potentials and gifts, and pours His Love upon the seeker in torrents and trickles alike. | God does not answer the words. He answers the longing underneath them. |
| [Lesson on Soul-Desire](messages/2016/01/2016-01-24-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑24 | Mind & Soul |  | Augustine teaches that the desires of the soul and the desires of the mind are often different, and that this mismatch is the source of inner conflict in prayer — a soul may long for God's Love while the mind feels unworthy of it. He calls each seeker to plumb the depths of the soul, set aside the material mind's clutter, fear, and sense of unworthiness, and bring forward true soul-desire with intensity and clarity so that the soul may truly commune with God. | Your soul may be reaching for God while your mind insists you are unworthy. Which one is doing the praying? |
| [A Sanctuary of Light](messages/2016/01/2016-01-25-af-peter.md) | Peter | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑25 | Service & Mission |  | Peter affirms that every loving action of an earnest soul sends ripples of Light, kindness, and healing into the world, and that through their prayers and efforts the gathered have created a sanctuary, a place of Light where God's Love reigns and souls are replenished. He calls them to maintain this place, to welcome those in need, and to walk their Path of Light undeterred by those who would denigrate them, knowing the angels and the hand of God are upon them. | The ground beneath you becomes holy not by what stands on it, but by the love you carry through the door. |
| [Do Not Falter Upon Your Path](messages/2016/01/2016-01-26-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑26 | Service & Mission |  | John the Beloved urges the circle not to falter, doubt, or worry for their material well-being, but to seek God's Will in every breath, promising that in this search the door to their unique purpose will open. He teaches that each soul has been called to be an instrument for change and a channel of Love as the world approaches times of deep transition, and that fulfilling this purpose brings the deepest joy any soul can know. | Almost no one finds the door to their purpose while on Earth. It is standing right in front of you, and it opens from the inside. |
| [How I Became a Channel of Love in the World](messages/2016/01/2016-01-28-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2016‑01‑28 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Spirit Biography | Francis of Assisi recounts how he found God's Love while on Earth, renouncing the pleasures and allurements of the material world for a humble life of prayer, communion with nature, and walking among many souls as a channel of Love. He describes the Celestial Heavens where all commune equally in their love of God under Jesus, and assures the gathered that this same Gift — requiring no church or dogma, only an earnest request from the depths of the soul — is available to every soul and leads to at-onement with God for all eternity. | The man who spoke to the birds did not begin holy. He began wealthy, restless, and hungry for something he could not name. |
| [Allow God to Touch Those Wounded and Dark Recesses Within Your Souls](messages/2016/02/2016-02-02-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑02 | Jesus Speaks, Healing Path |  | Jesus invites the circle to open the hidden, wounded places of their souls to the transforming Touch of the Father's Love, and teaches that God's Will comes not as a dramatic sign but as a seed of a thought, a small inkling that grows as Love nurtures it. He urges them to honour and act upon this quiet guidance, to choose the Path of Love over the criticism and manipulation of others, and to trust the treasure trove of gifts waiting to be awakened within their souls. | You are waiting for God to shout. He is already whispering, in a thought so small you keep mistaking it for your own. |
| [Remember to Nourish Your Soul](messages/2016/02/2016-02-10-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑10 | Healing Path | Divine Healing | Confucius counsels those doing healing work to pray for God to touch each soul through them, so that they act in resonance and harmony with the flow of Divine Love. He teaches that while many energies and emanations of body and spirit exist, the emanation of love from the soul is the most powerful, and that the healer must nourish their own soul foremost, keeping prayer and longing for God at the forefront so that all gifts, learnings, and healing fall into harmony. | Before you can pour healing into another soul, there is one soul you must tend first - your own. |
| [Forge That Path to Your Souls and Thereby to God](messages/2016/02/2016-02-15-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑15 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that humanity has revered and nurtured the mind while neglecting the soul, which lies cloistered beneath fears and conditions, and that the path to God is forged by setting aside the mind's distorted interpretations so the soul, enlivened by Divine Love, can open. He lays out the choice between the Divine Love path and the natural love path, urging his students to know these distinctions clearly and to choose the Divine Path, which brings a closeness to God that the natural love cannot equal. | You know your own mind better than you know your own soul. Augustine says that is exactly backwards. |
| [Open Wide Your Souls](messages/2016/02/2016-02-15-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑15 |  |  | Confucius warmly invites the circle to set aside resistance and doubt and lay bare their souls on a winter's night, that the Father's Love may flow in and kindle its warmth and Light. He assures them this Touch brings healing, comfort, and the way to at-onement with God, which grows the soul into a fountain of wisdom, Love, and joy. | On the coldest night, the warmth you are looking for is not in the room. It is waiting inside your own soul. |
| [You Struggle but You Do Make Progress](messages/2016/02/2016-02-29-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑29 | Healing Path |  | Confucius reassures the circle that even when the welling up of buried pain feels difficult, releasing those burdens to God is real progress and brings them closer to lasting joy. He teaches that the soul generates a condition of light or darkness in the world, that judgement, anger, and fear pull a soul from the Light, and that the way through is self-love and compassion, breaking the barriers that restrict Love so God can heal the tender, hurting places within. | The painful welling-up you are trying to push back down is not a setback. It is the cleansing itself. |
| [Fighting Back the Darkness of the Earth Conditions](messages/2016/02/2016-02-29-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2016‑02‑29 | Healing Path, Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Luke explains why a soul can feel God's Love one day and feel burdened the next: the conditions of this world, generated by the thoughts and actions of men, move like weather in waves and affect every being. He teaches that prayer is the foundation that neutralizes this darkness both within and around the soul, calls the gathered to be warriors who choose Light with each breath, and assures them that though they will not succeed every day, each prayer and each choice for Light brings them closer to lasting joy and freedom. | Why is the Light so close one day and gone the next? Luke says the weather you are feeling is not your own. |
| [God's Little Surprises](messages/2016/03/2016-03-06-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑06 |  |  | Goldie delights in the surprising ways God brings souls together in Love, assuring the gathered that this is what is meant for them: to work together, to be generous of heart, and to support one another. She promises to keep surprising them whenever she can. | The people who arrive in your life unannounced may be the ones God planned for all along. |
| [A Greeting](messages/2016/03/2016-03-06-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑06 | Jesus Speaks, Awakening Humanity |  | Jesus tells the circle they are embarking on a deeper spiritual journey, one in which they will release material burdens and dedicate themselves more fully to God, becoming free to be guided wherever He leads. He calls them vanguards of a profound, reverberating change coming to the world as God touches each soul, urging them to be strong, unattached, and close to God, assured that they walk under his protection. | The burdens you are ready to set down are the very things that have kept you from going where you are needed. |
| [Sensitive Souls Are the Saviours of This World](messages/2016/03/2016-03-07-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑07 | Awakening Humanity, Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches that sensitive souls, who find the world a difficult and painful place, progress swiftly in spirit and are the saving grace of this world, for they refuse the darkness of judgement, fear, and anger and choose love, compassion, and truth. He assures these tender-hearted seekers that they have chosen this path over mediocrity, that God's Hand is firmly upon them so the world cannot harm them, and that their very example will turn heads and sow seeds of Love that touch many souls. | The sensitivity that makes the world so hard to bear is not a weakness to fix. It is the very thing that makes you a saviour. |
| [Greetings from Victor Summers](messages/2016/03/2016-03-07-af-victor-summers.md) | Victor Summers | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑07 |  |  | Victor Summers greets a friend from his Earth life, urging him to first bring God's Love and healing into himself before he can carry it into the world. He testifies to his own progression, now in the Seventh Sphere on the doorstep of the Celestial Kingdom and almost fully redeemed, and warns the circle against the doubt and feelings of unworthiness that were his own great hindrance, calling them to put these aside, be kind to themselves, and carry on the work begun by Padgett and Jesus. | The doubt that troubled his ministry on Earth did not end him. From the doorstep of Heaven, he warns you not to repeat it. |
| [Struggle of Soul and Mind](messages/2016/03/2016-03-10-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑10 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches that the soul is with God while the mind is often caught up with the conditions of humanity, and that this is the source of inner tension and restlessness. When facing a decision, he counsels, the mind races through many plans and outcomes, but the seeker must instead go to the soul and ask there, choosing knowing over believing and peace over agitation. Steps taken from that place of soul-awareness feel like gaining true understanding rather than falling into an abyss, and all else falls into harmony. | When you face a choice, your mind offers a hundred plans. Augustine says the answer is in the one place you keep overlooking. |
| [Struggle of Mind](messages/2016/03/2016-03-10-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑10 | Mind & Soul |  | Confucius reflects on the willfulness of mortals, whose great powers of free will and creative thought, exerted without love or wisdom, burden the world. He teaches that the way forward is to let the soul inform the mind, taming the human craving for power and acknowledgement while still loving every aspect of oneself, and to strengthen the soul in Love through prayer so that it takes its rightful precedence. Only then can a person become God's clear instrument of change, for it is God who changes the world, through willing souls. | You gather hoping to change the world. Confucius gently corrects you: you are not the one who changes it. |
| [Encrustations of the Soul](messages/2016/03/2016-03-11-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑11 | Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Luke teaches that the joy and Light within the soul press against a hardened shell of encrustations formed by life's experiences, and that as Divine Love flows in, the pressure grows until the cracks widen and these conditions burst away. He emphasizes that these encrustations are not the mark of sin or depravity but simply the result of having lived in this world, and calls the seeker to have compassion for themselves, to choose the Light daily, and to recognize each fragment that falls away as a triumph on the road of redemption. | The pain you carry is not proof that you are sinful. It is only the mark of having lived in this world, and it can fall away. |
| [A Door Has Opened for You](messages/2016/03/2016-03-12-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑12 |  |  | Faith rejoices that a door has opened and urges the circle to walk through it in joy, trusting God to orchestrate what unfolds rather than worrying over outcomes or material needs. She affirms that each of them has an opportunity to be an integral part of God's plan for the salvation of mankind, that travelling the world in prayer as a channel of Love plants seeds whose harvest will be great, and that every prayer they make furthers that plan. | A door has opened. You cannot see the plan behind it, but your part is only to walk through in joy. |
| [Even Material Work Can Be a Channel of Love](messages/2016/03/2016-03-12-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑12 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | As the circle cleans and prepares a home, James teaches that the love they imbue into the place will, by the Law of Attraction, draw the souls meant to live there. He urges them not to restrict their idea of what being a channel of Love means: even material, mundane work, done in love, enacts God's Will and becomes a blessing. Every situation is an opportunity to bring Light, and what matters is the love, attitude, and intention one brings to the task. | You think being a channel of Love means prayer and ministry. James says the broom in your hand counts too. |
| [God's Touch in the World](messages/2016/03/2016-03-12-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑12 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved teaches that God is at work in every moment of a person's life, touching, leading, and opening doors, even when His Love is not felt. He assures the circle that the flame of Love each carries can never be diminished, and that their prayers and loving intentions cause ripples in the world, touching souls they will never know of. This, he teaches, is their greatest resource and the way true change happens: by being God's Touch in the world through prayer. | Your prayers are sending ripples to souls you will never meet. You feel nothing happen, and yet it is the most powerful thing you do. |
| [Keep the Flame Burning](messages/2016/03/2016-03-13-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑13 |  |  | Faith thanks the circle for their commitment to bring Light through prayer to a place she once knew, urging them to go in faith and humility rather than ambivalence, and to keep the flame of prayer burning there. She teaches that their steadfast presence sows seeds in those who witness it, that recognition from others is of no consequence since God sees their efforts, and that even the neediest and most resistant souls will be touched if they let God's Love flow through them unrestricted. God's Will, she assures them, will manifest, though it may take a circuitous route. | No one may ever thank you or even notice. God sees the flame you keep burning, and that is the whole point. |
| [Talk on Children](messages/2016/03/2016-03-14-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑14 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary speaks of the children of the world as its future and stewards, grieving that so many, even amid plenty, are lost and unloved, caught in distraction and unable to know themselves. She affirms that some are born now with great potential to lead the world to Light, calls the circle to pray for them, and teaches the simple truth that every soul is made in love, to love, for love, and is here to discover itself, to love, and to know God. The great work is to teach these truths and help tear away the layers that bury the soul, beginning with the children whose hearts remain open. | The purpose of life is so simple that we miss it: to discover who you are, to love, and to know God. |
| [The Resonance of Love Amongst You](messages/2016/03/2016-03-16-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑16 | Jesus Speaks, Service & Mission |  | Jesus tells the circle that it is not the task but the love poured into it that brings God's Touch, and that beneath every difference of culture, language, and appearance the soul resonates with love. He calls them to greet the soul in everyone they meet, opening channels of Love that God weaves into a tapestry of Light around the world, and assures them that as their conditions fall away they will be compelled into a passionate, eternal work of service guided by the knowledge of the soul. | The person across from you seems so different. Look past the mind to the soul, and you will find it already resonating with love. |
| [You Are Truly Beautiful Souls](messages/2016/03/2016-03-16-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑16 | Healing Path |  | Seretta Kem affirms that Jesus loves each soul in the circle and holds them close, and promises to return through the instrument to bring greater knowledge. Humbled by the Light of their prayer together, he tells them they are truly beautiful souls and expresses his hope that they will one day fully accept this and learn to love themselves with great joy. | The spirits keep telling you that you are beautiful. What would change if you finally believed them? |
| [You Must Be the Examples](messages/2016/03/2016-03-17-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑17 | Service & Mission |  | Alec Gaunt teaches the circle that the most powerful tool for reaching others is not the arguments of the mind but the experience of Divine Love itself, conveyed through their own example and through Circles of Light. He calls them to teach from the flow of the soul rather than from constructed mental structures, draws on his own Earth life to warn against letting ego and ambition obstruct God's Will, and describes the long work of clearing the channel between soul and mind until a great breakthrough of Light comes. | You cannot argue anyone into the truth. You can only let them watch you live it. |
| [Talk on Service to God](messages/2016/03/2016-03-18-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑18 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved encourages the circle never to doubt their service to God, teaching that every soul aligned with God's Will serves Him in many ways — seen and unseen — and that as the soul deepens in Divine Love, service becomes clearer, more powerful, and more joyfully aligned with God's unfolding plan. | You and God are bonded for all eternity and you shall continue to serve Him in ever greater ways |
| [The Awakening of Humanity](messages/2016/03/2016-03-21-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Augustine declares that humanity is in a deep spiritual slumber, and that those gathered are the first tender shoots of a great awakening dawning for mankind — called to drink deep of God's Love, release all barriers, and emerge into the Light of their unique purpose and service. | You are the first tender shoots of a spring that is dawning for all of mankind |
| [Importance of Prayer](messages/2016/03/2016-03-25-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑25 | Service & Mission |  | Augustine encourages the circle to keep gathering souls together in prayer, teaching that every sincere prayer strikes its mark and brings a response from God, with real effects in the world. He assures them that each time they pray together they strengthen the Light, grow their souls, and clarify the purpose God has placed within them, and urges them to act whenever they feel prompted to pray or to draw others into prayer. | You wonder if your prayers reach Him. Augustine says every sincere one strikes the mark. |
| [Message on Good Friday](messages/2016/03/2016-03-25-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑25 | The Saints & Apostles Speak, Service & Mission |  | On Good Friday, Mary remembers her son's death at the hands of those who sought power and feared his message of Love, and grieves how the centuries since have distorted his Truth into myth and error. She honours the circle for carrying his clear message into the world, and urges them to keep defying the darkness, walking in Light, and taking up the lantern of Truth as he did, for the need is even greater now than when he walked the Earth. | They killed him for the message. Two thousand years later the myths remain, and the work of carrying the real one falls to you. |
| [Talk on Service](messages/2016/03/2016-03-26-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑26 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew celebrates the many forms of service already expressed by those gathered — healing, teaching, raising children, loving others — and urges them to continue opening their souls to Divine Love, the very spark of their desire to serve, trusting that God will guide each one along their unique path of expression. | There is a deep recognition within you that you are meant to love and to be a channel of Love |
| [Springtime](messages/2016/03/2016-03-26-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑26 |  |  | Goldie greets the circle with springtime joy, drawing a parallel between the new life rising from the ground and the new life God is bringing forth from their souls. She celebrates the beautiful gifts waiting to bloom within each soul under the warmth of God's Love, and calls the group to be joyful and to celebrate the new life all around and within them. | The same force pushing green shoots through the cold ground is at work in you. |
| [Mediumship, Communication and Rapport](messages/2016/03/2016-03-27-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑27 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem teaches the dynamics of mediumship, naming the laws that come into play and explaining how a truth held wordlessly in the soul is narrowed and distorted as it passes up into the material mind, so that no medium is perfect and every message is incomplete. He calls each soul to deepen the channel between soul and mind through prayer, to send love to those who speak, and to recognise that all souls, not only mediums, are continually influenced by spirit. | What your soul knows wordlessly must squeeze up through a narrow, cluttered channel to reach your mind. This is why no message arrives whole. |
| [The Power of Commitment](messages/2016/03/2016-03-28-af-joseph.md) | Joseph | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑28 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Joseph, the earthly father of Jesus, speaks on the power of commitment, recalling how the tenets of his own religion once made it hard for him to commit to his son's simple Truths of Love, a clarity he reached only in spirit. He teaches that the mind forever complicates and distracts while the soul is satisfied by simple Truth, and that as Divine Love grows, commitment deepens from mere mental belief into soulful knowing, until the soul informs the mind and a clear channel to God brings deep peace, harmony, and freedom from doubt. | Your mind keeps complicating what your soul already accepts. Even the father of Jesus could not commit until he stopped. |
| [The Gift of Life](messages/2016/03/2016-03-29-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑29 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James reflects on the gift and purpose of incarnation — the soul's entry into flesh to acquire identity, express its unique gifts, and grow in love — and offers comfort to the circle in a time of bereavement, assuring them that God's hand rests upon all who grieve and that peace will come. | To know your soul and to know who you truly are is the greatest of all gifts to yourself |
| [Welcome New Friends](messages/2016/03/2016-03-30-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑30 |  |  | Alec Gaunt welcomes newcomers to the circle, assuring them they are among friends in a place of love, safety, and nurturing where they need not feel vulnerable. He encourages those further along the path to mentor those just beginning, and urges the new arrivals to ask questions, set aside the doubts of the mind, and take the risk of listening to the stirrings of their souls. He promises that as they make even small efforts in prayer and openness, a great and sure response from God will come. | That stirring you cannot name is your soul. The mind will tell you to doubt it. Listen anyway. |
| [A Lesson on the Power of Humility](messages/2016/03/2016-03-30-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑30 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Augustine delivers a deeply personal teaching on humility, confessing openly that in his Earth life he was a man of ambition, desire for power, and fleshly pleasures who taught error that still persists in the church today. From this confession he draws a powerful teaching: true humility is not weakness but the greatest strength, allowing God's Love to flow through you unrestricted, unfiltered, and uncontaminated by self-will. | True power is not control. It is the strength that comes from letting God flow through you unrestricted |
| [Greetings to Beginners in Circle](messages/2016/03/2016-03-30-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑30 |  |  | Confucius greets beginners drawn by the pull of their souls to gather in prayer, urging them to drink deep of the Father's Divine Love and open themselves to His response. He promises that for those who seek in sincerity and long from the depths of their souls, the door will open to at-onement with the Source, a peace beyond all understanding, and a truth beyond what the mind can comprehend, freeing them from their pains, doubts, and fears and opening a whole new world. | Something is pulling at your soul. Follow it, and a whole new world opens. |
| [Humility at WHC](messages/2016/03/2016-03-30-af-faith-nyquist.md) | Faith | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑30 |  |  | Faith counsels the circle to be humble, loving, gracious, and gentle when they go to her old home, for this simple loving way is more powerful than anything and will melt resistance, suspicion, and fear. She urges them to release all judgments and fears, to stop speculating and formulating, and simply to allow God to use them, trusting His Will to bring a powerful channel of change, love, and healing to a place in great need. | You think you need a strategy for the hard room. Faith says walk in with love and watch the walls come down. |
| [The Purpose of Divine Love](messages/2016/03/2016-03-31-af-judas.md) | Judas | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑31 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Judas traces the whole arc of Divine Love from the beginning: God placed an individuated soul, a reflection of Himself, within the first human beings and offered them His own Essence, a gift they rejected in their contentment, so it was withdrawn until Jesus brought it back to humanity. Drawing on his own discipleship, his naive betrayal, and the transformation of Pentecost, Judas teaches that this gift can only be known through an awakening of the soul and is always a free choice, and he calls the circle to keep telling others, for this is God's purpose for every soul. | God offered His own Essence to the first souls. They were content, and said no. The offer has been standing open ever since. |
| [Encouragement from Mary](messages/2016/03/2016-03-31-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑03‑31 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary encourages her beloved daughters in their service, teaching that God never pushes but asks His Will through gentle whispers, and that when they follow it they are carried in the river of Love even through difficult and taxing tasks. She calls them to stand firm and bold in love against those who would pull them down, to have compassion for themselves when the mind interferes with doubt, and to choose love in every moment, trusting that as they serve, their souls grow and the Father's Will unfolds like a flower with many petals. | God will not push you. He whispers. The question is whether you have grown quiet enough to hear. |
| [In Knowing and Growing Your Soul, You Will Find Your True Self](messages/2016/04/2016-04-04-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑04 | Jesus Speaks | Core Teaching | Jesus calls those gathered to move beyond mental constructs of service and surrender to the higher road of listening for and obeying God's Will, promising that in doing so they will discover their true soul's purpose, experience profound joy and fulfillment, and become a genuine gift to the world. | You are a gift to the world. As you truly love yourselves, oh what wonders your Heavenly Father may manifest through you |
| [The Prism of Our Souls](messages/2016/04/2016-04-04-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea atta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑04 | Prism of the Soul | Core Teaching | Keea atta Kem teaches that Divine Love acts as a prism through which the light of the soul is refracted into many unique gifts and colors, and that each soul possesses a distinct combination of these gifts — healing, perception, empathy, wisdom, communication — which God enlivens and orchestrates in beautiful and wondrous ways. | The light within your soul refracts through the prism of God's Love, each colour a unique gift |
| [Talk on Compassion and Service](messages/2016/04/2016-04-05-af-gandhi.md) | Mahatma Gandhi | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑05 | Awakening Humanity, Letters from History | Historical, Spirit Biography | Mahatma Gandhi draws on the lessons of his own Earth life to encourage the circle to pursue their mission of spiritual awakening with clarity, dedication, compassion, and inspiration from God, promising that those who fight to push back darkness and bring spiritual change to the world will receive special dispensations of strength and power from God. | Everyone hungers for love. Prepare a feast for the starving soul |
| [Expectations of the Mind: On Releasing Control](messages/2016/04/2016-04-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑12 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine calls his students to release the mind's need to control outcomes and impose its will upon the world and those around them, teaching that true humility is this act of letting go, and that in doing so God's Will can infuse every part of their lives, marking the beginning of their ministry in the world. | Think how much freedom you will obtain by simply letting go |
| [Lesson on the Falsity of the Vicarious Atonement and the Unsure Nature of Written Truth](messages/2016/04/2016-04-12-af-moses.md) | Moses | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑12 | Letters from History, Two Paths | Core Teaching, Historical | Moses repudiates the doctrine of the Vicarious Atonement, tracing its roots to the blood sacrifice tradition of ancient Judaism, and teaches that no written word — not even the Bible — constitutes absolute Truth; rather, Truth is received personally through the soul's connection with God and expressed through the channel of Divine Love, not through argument or correction of others. | The word is not sacred. What is sacred is your living connection with your Heavenly Father |
| [The Greatest Healing Energy of All Is God's Divine Love](messages/2016/04/2016-04-13-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑13 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem acknowledges the many healing energies and practices present in the circle, but teaches that Divine Love — God's Essence poured into the soul through longing and prayer — is the one gift that cannot be passed from person to person, must come directly from God, and surpasses all other healing energies in power, permanence, and transformative effect. | One blessing cannot be passed from person to person. It must come directly from God. |
| [Each Day Has the Potential to Bring Light Given the Right Intentions](messages/2016/04/2016-04-14-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑14 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved teaches on the power of intention, showing how a soul's sincere desire to seek the highest, serve others, embrace all they meet, and push back the darkness creates real and lasting change in the world — magnified over and over as Divine Love deepens within. | Like the butterfly that flutters its wings and creates the hurricane, these tiny flutters of Light will create change |
| [Nurture Those You Encounter](messages/2016/04/2016-04-14-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑14 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary affirms the nurturing hearts of those gathered and encourages them to continue embracing every soul they meet with love and compassion, teaching that even a simple touch of love plants within that soul a desire for God's Love and can ignite great spiritual change. | God places within the souls of those you touch a desire for His Love, and this is powerful |
| [You Will Come Together Again](messages/2016/04/2016-04-19-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑19 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine closes a season of intense teaching and fellowship by affirming how much has been accomplished, promising the group will be summoned together again, and urging them to carry the treasure of Truth they have received — sharing it in love, humility, and joy. | Hidden within each lesson is a great door to growing your souls |
| [The Law of Change](messages/2016/04/2016-04-27-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2016‑04‑27 |  |  | Alec Gaunt teaches that change is a fundamental law of the universe, and that the key to navigating it is not resistance but a willing, faith-filled acceptance of God's hand in all transitions — for when God's Love is within you, even the most unexpected changes become joyous doorways to greater Light and growth. | Change itself is the path, not an obstacle to it |
| [Two Paths Towards Love and Purification](messages/2016/05/2016-05-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑05‑02 | Two Paths, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Andrew teaches that every soul faces two paths of purification: the natural love path, which requires full conscious recompense for every memory and injury carried in the soul through the spirit spheres, and the Divine Love path, which transforms and releases these conditions exponentially through God's healing fire — a swifter, higher road to the Celestial Heavens and unlimited soul growth. | You are already building your eternal home with every prayer you say today |
| [Walk with Me in This Light](messages/2016/05/2016-05-11-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2016‑05‑11 | Two Paths, Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus comes to be with those gathered in prayer, calling them to immerse themselves in the river of God's Love, offering the prayer for Divine Love in his own words, and inviting each soul to walk with him on the path that leads to at-onement, truth, and holy communion with God. | The prayer itself, offered by Jesus as a living invitation |
| [Aman Speaks of the Original State of Humanity and the Fall from Grace](messages/2016/05/2016-05-29-af-aman.md) | Aman | Al Fike | 2016‑05‑29 | Two Paths, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography, Historical | Aman, the first parent of humanity, gives a first-person account of the original paradisical state of mankind, the fateful moment when suspicion of God's offer of Divine Love became the first sin, the swift fall from grace that followed, and his deep regret — and wisdom — about a choice that set the course of all human history. | The choice refused at the beginning of time is being offered again, and this time we can choose differently |
| [Breaking Free of the Shell Around Your Soul](messages/2016/06/2016-06-13-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑06‑13 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James reassures those anxious about their spiritual progress that despite their mental struggles and self-judgment, they are already channels of Love in the world — and that the restlessness and fragility they feel is the shell of encrustation cracking as their true souls emerge, like a chick breaking free from the egg, with God and His angels as midwives. | You are already in the process of being reborn. The struggle you feel is the shell cracking, not failure |
| [You Will Fulfill Your Mandate to Be a Channel of Love at My Home](messages/2016/06/2016-06-27-af-brother-mandus.md) | Brother Mandus | Al Fike | 2016‑06‑27 | Letters from History | Spirit Biography, Historical | Brother Mandus, founder of the World Healing Crusade in Blackpool, England, speaks to members of the circle who have been serving at his organisation, assuring them that despite opposition and mental obstacles, God's Will to use them as channels of Divine Love at his house will manifest — and that what is needed is not a strong personality but a humble, prayerful, soul-centred servant of God's Will. | What is needed is not a strong personality but a humble, prayerful soul |
| [Love Is the True Currency of Life](messages/2016/07/2016-07-04-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2016‑07‑04 | Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Francis of Assisi speaks of love as the great unifying force of the universe and the true currency of life, sharing how he found God's Love alone in the forest among creatures, and urging all who seek spiritually to beseech God for this Love — whether through the natural or Divine Love path — for it will transform the soul, awaken its gifts, and lead to at-onement with God. | Love is not something to find outside yourself. It is something God pours in when you simply ask |
| [The Awakened Soul](messages/2016/07/2016-07-09-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2016‑07‑09 | Mind & Soul |  | Confucius welcomes a circle of souls seeking Truth and gently directs them inward — to plumb the depths of their own souls — teaching that it is God's Love that ignites a soul to awaken, and that the awakened soul has a capacity to understand Truth that the mind alone simply cannot access. | The awakened soul understands Truth in ways the mind simply cannot |
| [Nurturing the Mind or the Soul: It's a Choice](messages/2016/07/2016-07-10-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2016‑07‑10 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a comprehensive teaching on the soul's yearning as the true key to God, contrasting the mind's compulsion to rationalize and control with the soul's deeper capacity to receive Divine Truth. He traces the roots of human error to the mind's domination over the soul, charts both the natural love and Divine Love paths to their ultimate destinations, and urges each soul to plumb its own depths and follow the yearning that leads to at-onement with God. | The yearning itself is the prayer, and the crack in the armor of the mind is where God enters |
| [You Will All Be Instrumental on the Path](messages/2016/08/2016-08-15-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2016‑08‑15 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Mary celebrates the joyful gathering of souls and assures them that not only do their Circles of Light bless many in this world and the spirit world, but that they stand on the threshold of a great work beginning — when each soul's true purpose will manifest in a mighty wave, opening doors of service and instrumentality in God's plan for the healing and salvation of mankind. | You are standing on the threshold of a great work already begun |
| [Express the Potentials of Your Awakening Souls](messages/2016/08/2016-08-16-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2016‑08‑16 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James acknowledges the noise and distraction of the material world and encourages the circle to remain in the flow of God's Love throughout each day, assuring them that as they do, the great treasure of gifts within their awakening souls will rise into expression — and they will come to know God's Will, walk in Light, and touch many souls as testimony to His Love. | The treasure house of your soul's gifts is already there, waiting to be discovered |
| [The Minds of Men Hunger for the Reality that Words Create but the Soul Hungers for Love](messages/2016/08/2016-08-17-af-james-padgett.md) | James Padgett | Al Fike | 2016‑08‑17 | Service & Mission, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | James Padgett reflects openly on his own fear and desire for recognition when the truth of Divine Love first came to him, and uses it to teach that effective ministry requires not perfect knowledge or a polished presentation, but a humble, loving sharing of one's own unique experience of God — for it is the embrace, not the argument, that touches another soul. | Your unique story of Love is all you need, and your embrace will touch souls your words alone never could |
| [The World Needs Your Prayers](messages/2016/12/2016-12-02-af-white-cloud.md) | White Cloud | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑02 | Awakening Humanity |  | White Cloud responds to the circle's prayers for a struggling world, affirming that those who speak truth do so because they know it in their hearts, and urging all who carry the truth of God's Love to pray for the world — its lost souls, its children, its hungry — and to express that Love gently, daily, and with dignity, for love is the only true agent of healing and change. | Love is not the soft option. It is the most powerful force in the universe |
| [Talk on Mediumship: The Laws of Communication and Rapport](messages/2016/12/2016-12-06-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑06 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a comprehensive teaching on the gift of mediumship — how spirit communication works, the conditions required for it, the dangers of expectation and premature gift-opening, and the crucial discernment principle that any message not centred on God's Love and the flowering of the soul is not from a Celestial angel. He concludes that while mediumship is a blessing, the gift of Divine Love received in prayer is infinitely greater. | The gift of Divine Love received wordlessly in prayer is greater than any message from a spirit |
| [Be Calm in the Coming Storms](messages/2016/12/2016-12-07-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑07 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Andrew speaks prophetically of coming changes in both the world and within each soul, urging those gathered to accept the flow of God's Love and allow it to fully transform them — for in the coming storms they will be the calm, steady souls others look to for comfort, truth, and guidance. | In any storm, the soul that is calm is the one others turn to |
| [Time to Accept a New Way of Being](messages/2016/12/2016-12-29-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2016‑12‑29 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Matthew speaks prophetically of changes coming in the new year for the circle and the world, urging them to release the illusions and mental constructs built up over a lifetime and accept the new reality of soul-centred truth — for they are being prepared to lead others through the same transformative process in the times ahead. | The reality you have built in your mind is not the only reality. Letting go of it is liberation, not loss |
