The only obstructions are the ones you create yourself |
| [Accept Every Unique Soul: Their Differences Will Not Harm You Spiritually](messages/2017/01/2017-01-16-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2017‑01‑16 | Prism of the Soul |  | Keea atta Kem addresses the anxiety of spiritually sensitive souls who feel affected by the world's conditions, teaching that increased sensitivity is a natural sign of soul growth, that thoughts attract like energies by law, and that the Love within a growing soul provides powerful protection — so there is no need for fear, only joyful acceptance of each unique soul walking their own path toward God. | Sensitivity is a sign of growth, not vulnerability, and the Love within you is stronger than anything you encounter outside |
| [Changes Within Your Soul Will Bring Many Rewards](messages/2017/01/2017-01-23-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2017‑01‑23 | Mind & Soul, Healing Path |  | Alec Gaunt addresses souls in the midst of deep inner transformation, teaching that the discomfort, confusion, and self-criticism they feel is the natural result of old patterns and conditions being burned away by God's Love. He urges them to recognize that the outward conscious self they cling to is not their true self, and that as the fire of Divine Love burns brighter within, the treasures of their true souls will emerge in beauty and power. | The outward self you cling to is a paper tiger. Your true self, with all its gifts and treasures, is waiting inside your soul |
| [Building a Foundation of Spiritual Growth and Development](messages/2017/01/2017-01-25-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2017‑01‑25 |  |  | Alec Gaunt returns to a church he has visited many times both in the flesh and in spirit, urging those gathered to open themselves to the living waters of God's Love and build within themselves the great foundation of a relationship with their Heavenly Father - one that will carry them through every challenge, every joy, and every aspect of their lives. | The greatest fulfillment your soul can experience is simply to be with God |
| [Release Self-Will and Embrace the Perfect Will of God](messages/2017/03/2017-03-27-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2017‑03‑27 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James speaks with compassion to souls caught between the world of man and the world of God, teaching that the struggle to release self-will and surrender to God's Will is the central challenge of the Divine Path - and that while the mind clings stubbornly to the old ways, the soul has already chosen, and progress is inevitable for those who continue to pray and turn their face to God. | You already know which way you will choose. Your soul drew you here |
| [Faculties of the Soul Compared to a Camera Lens](messages/2017/04/2017-04-10-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2017‑04‑10 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | James clarifies how God's Will flows through a soul by using the metaphor of a camera: the image of Truth is placed directly within the soul by God's Love, the iris represents the soul's will and desire which regulates how much flows through, and the lens is the mind which either focuses or distorts what comes forth. When all three are in alignment, the result is a clear and undoubted expression of God's Will in the world. | The image of God's Truth is already within you. The only question is whether the iris is open and the lens is clear |
| [Jesus Speaks of the Pentecost](messages/2017/05/2017-05-11-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2017‑05‑11 | Awakening Humanity, Jesus Speaks, Letters from History | Core Teaching | Jesus explains the historical conditions that allowed his disciples to receive the Pentecost, then holds up an honest mirror to those gathered, asking whether their longing is truly deep enough to receive it. He teaches that soul awakening may come gradually or in a great rush, that God always desires to give this gift, and that the only thing preventing the Pentecost is the soul's own unreadiness to receive it fully. | The only thing holding you back from the awakening of your soul is you |
| [Accept the Diversity that God Created](messages/2017/05/2017-05-13-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2017‑05‑13 | Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography, Historical | Yogananda speaks from his own sanctuary in Encinitas, confirming he inhabits the Celestial Kingdom and that his teachings, though expressed in his own tradition, were always rooted in the same Truth of God's Love. He calls those gathered to accept the diversity of God's creation, embrace all souls regardless of background or belief, and understand that each unique voice adds to the full and beautiful truth of God's Love in the world. | When different souls bring their truth together, they create something more beautiful than any one of them could alone |
| [Allow God to Use You as His Channel of Love](messages/2017/05/2017-05-22-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2017‑05‑22 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew affirms two instruments who have been travelling and serving, reminding them that God uses willing souls in ways they often cannot see or measure - through a smile, a comment, an intention - and calls all who are willing to walk openly in faith each day, trusting that God will guide every step as part of His great plan for the salvation of mankind. | When your days are over and you look back, you will see that every step led to the next, and your life was an expression of Light |
| [Lesson on Judgement](messages/2017/06/2017-06-15-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2017‑06‑15 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a comprehensive lesson on the urge to judge, teaching that our reactions to others' conditions reveal our own soul state, that judgment is incompatible with Love, and that the antidote is not suppression but conscious choice - catching yourself in the act of judgment and choosing Love instead. He includes an extended first-person inner monologue as a template for how to make that choice in the moment. | With Love, I cannot judge. With joy, I cannot judge. With acceptance, I cannot judge |
| [Only the Soul Can Know God's Love](messages/2017/08/2017-08-21-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2017‑08‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew teaches that the soul's experience of God's Love cannot be described intellectually, only felt - and that each soul's experience of this Touch is unique. He warns against turning personal spiritual experience into a dogmatic formula, urging all to validate and accept the wide range of ways that God's Love manifests within different souls. | A thousand words and a million books will never bring this Truth as it is experienced by that deep Touch from God |
| [Release of Limitations](messages/2017/09/2017-09-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑12 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine acknowledges the real limitations of living in a material body and mind shaped by early conditioning, and teaches that God's Love, incrementally building within the soul, has the power to purify these conditions from the inside outward - bringing not a loss of self but a simplification and clarification of consciousness, where soul wisdom replaces mental complexity and self-judgment gives way to deep self-love. | There is so much to learn, and yet there is so much to unlearn |
| [The Time Approaches](messages/2017/09/2017-09-12-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑12 | Awakening Humanity | Prophecy | Confucius, speaking on behalf of many angels who wish to address the circle, announces that the time is approaching when years of prayer and soul longing will open many doors of opportunity to bring Light, Truth, Peace, and Love to a world in desperate need - with the entire Celestial Kingdom watching and ready to guide and support each willing instrument. | All those years of prayer are about to open doors you have not yet imagined |
| [Understanding the Laws of Love and the Regeneration of Our Souls](messages/2017/09/2017-09-12-af-martin-luther.md) | Martin Luther | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑12 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths | Core Teaching | Martin Luther responds to the group's conversation about limitations, teaching that God has created an ordered universe governed by laws, that the Law of Divine Love supersedes all others and can bypass the long process of natural love purification, and that each soul bears personal responsibility for their own regeneration - for God cannot spoon-feed a soul into harmony without that soul's own desire, effort, and prayer. | To one whose soul is filled with Love, obeying God's Laws is not a burden. It makes perfect sense |
| [Make Love Your Guiding Truth Through Earth Changes](messages/2017/09/2017-09-13-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2017‑09‑13 | Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching, Prophecy | Keea atta Kem delivers a wide-ranging prophetic teaching on the intensifying changes coming to the world - magnetic pole shifts, disrupted animal behaviour, dramatic environmental and social upheaval - teaching that these are the consequences of humanity's disregard for God's Laws of Creation, and that those who carry Divine Love will be guided to scientists, leaders, and seekers as rocks of stability and truth in the coming storms. | You will be a rock in a world disrupted by change, and the chaos around you will be the very thing that sends people to your door |
| [Choice and Accepting the Will of God](messages/2017/10/2017-10-25-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2017‑10‑25 | Service & Mission, Letters from History | Spirit Biography | Yogananda addresses the group's deliberations about a journey to India, using his own experience of leaving India for America as a teaching on faith, service, and accepting God's invitations. He teaches that God never demands or punishes, but lays opportunities before each soul — and that a soul filled with Love, faith, and trust is the one most able to step forward into the unknown and discover what God has prepared. | God will never turn away from you no matter what you decide. But if every invitation is rejected, the invitations will cease |
| [Tesla Talks About the Power of Love](messages/2017/11/2017-11-03-af-nikola-tesla.md) | Nikola Tesla | Al Fike | 2017‑11‑03 | Letters from History | Spirit Biography, Historical | Nikola Tesla speaks from spirit about his continued exploration of the universe's mechanics and his particular interest in assisting the development of Direct Voice mediumship, which he understands to have an electrical component. He teaches that Divine Love is the most powerful energy in the universe, that its capacities far exceed what humanity has understood, and that as souls mature in Love, scientific understanding will flourish in ways that will astound the world. | Love is not just a feeling. It is the most powerful energy in the universe, and its capacities have barely been understood |
| [On Soul Expiation](messages/2017/12/2017-12-12-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2017‑12‑12 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a detailed teaching on the mechanics of soul expiation, explaining how encrustations around the soul block the inflowing of Divine Love, the two major factors that prevent people from feeling God's Love in prayer, and the many routes by which God finds His way through even the most armoured soul. He also teaches that it is not the responsibility of God's channels to insist on any particular route for another soul, but simply to give the simple Truth of God's Love in love and respect. | There is always a crack in the armor. God always finds a way through |

Now it is time to carry this Truth to the world |

He calls them to take responsibility for their own thoughts and choices, reminding them that God and the angels are always available to help when asked. | You are babies no longer. The phase of application has begun |
| [Teach Each Soul to Go to God in Prayer](messages/2018/01/2018-01-01-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑01 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine opens 2018 by announcing a new phase of service for those gathered, promising that God's Will will be laid plainly before them as their souls awaken further. He cautions against becoming a source of dependence for those drawn to their Light, and teaches that the true mission is to humbly point each soul to God as the Source of all gifts, teaching every soul to go directly to God in prayer for themselves. | Resist the temptation of adulation. | [Many Gifts for the Circle of Seven](messages/2018/01/2018-01-09-af-lotus-blossom.md) | Lotus Blossom | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑09 |  | Prophecy | Lotus Blossom addresses a circle of seven beloved souls, promising that gifts of spiritual perception are coming to each one in unique ways. sight of auras, perception of spirits, inner hearing, and deep intuitive knowing. She urges them to allow these gifts to unfold naturally without forcing or formulating them through the mind, to support one another, and to trust that each moment lived in harmony with God is already an expression of His Will. | Like a flower emerging from the ground, your gifts are budding. They will come, and they will come quickly |
| [Who Will Bring the Truth to This World?](messages/2018/01/2018-01-21-af-professor-salyards.md) | Professor Salyards | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑21 |  | Prophecy, Historical | Professor Salyards, a tireless worker in the development of Direct Voice mediumship, affirms the circle's progress and urges them to maintain their hopeful expectation of this gift. He speaks with urgency about humanity's need to awaken before the consequences of the human condition become irreversible, and assures them that even if Direct Voice is not achieved, they will bring Truth through other gifts - but that this gift is very much worth pursuing. | How will the world change if not by this awakening of the soul, the faculties of the soul, the connection of the soul to God? |
| [New Thresholds, New Life](messages/2018/01/2018-01-24-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑24 |  |  | Alec Gaunt speaks to a group all standing on the threshold of change, assuring them that each soul is moving forward in its own timing, propelled by God's Love and Will. He encourages them to embrace the unexpected, to meet challenges with courage, and to trust that life's constant movement and change is itself the mechanism of soul growth and service. | Life conspires to bring growth. It is not stale and static but full of movement and openings |
| [God's Love Awakens the Gifts of the Soul](messages/2018/01/2018-01-29-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2018‑01‑29 | Prism of the Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | John the Beloved teaches that within each soul God has planted a unique garden of gifts and potentials awaiting germination through the Light of Divine Love. He urges each soul to look within, honour its own unique beauty, and express its gifts freely rather than copying another, for as each soul's lantern is lit, it will draw and awaken others until the whole world is alight. | God has planted a whole universe within you. It takes only one prayer to begin bringing it alive |
| [Allow the Soul to Have Its Say](messages/2018/03/2018-03-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑02 | Mind & Soul, Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Andrew responds to the group's conversation about discernment and guidance, teaching that even sincere souls receive impressions coloured by their own condition, and that the soul's wisdom must be allowed to rise above the mind's calculations. He shares the remarkable personal account of his own journey from the Celestial Heavens to the Hells to help his brother Judas, and draws from it the lesson that listening to the soul's urgings rather than the mind's judgements brings the greatest blessings and the most good. | I could have left my brother in the darkness. Instead I listened to the yearnings of my soul, and I was blessed the most |
| [Knowing the Potentials of God's Love Is an Infinite Journey](messages/2018/03/2018-03-08-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑08 | Healing Path |  | Seretta Kem welcomes two new souls into the circle and speaks of the infinite unfolding of God's Love, teaching that even Celestial spirits continue to discover new wonders within it. He encourages those gathered to trust that their connection with God is unbreakable and ever-expanding, and that each soul carries unique gifts and purposes that will emerge as they grow in Love. | Even those in the Celestial Kingdom do not know all the wonders of God's Love. It continues to unfold for them as it does for you |
| [You Come Close to Your Soul's Awakening](messages/2018/03/2018-03-11-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑11 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus comes to bless those gathered, affirming their strength and commitment to bringing Truth to the world, reassuring them that their work has far-reaching effects they cannot see, and telling them they are drawing close to the realization of their true selves and the awakening of their souls. | You cannot see the far-reaching effects of your work. But the strength and love and faith of those like you brings hope to this world |
| [In God's Love You Have Found Your Sanctuary of Light](messages/2018/03/2018-03-13-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑13 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus pours out a blessing upon those gathered, affirming that God carries them in His embrace, that simple faith and prayer are all that is required to know God's guidance, and that in their service and humility they will find grace. He promises that the flow of Living Waters into their souls will become endless as they awaken, and that the work of bringing Love to a darkened world has already begun within them. | God does not limit you. God releases you. He releases your true self so that you may truly be that unique being that you are |
| [Become the Winds of Change](messages/2018/03/2018-03-26-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2018‑03‑26 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | James urges those gathered to feel the winds of change already moving in the world and to open themselves to God's Touch so that they may become part of that change. He speaks of storms coming that will bring what is required to uplift humanity, calls each soul to put aside doubt and fear and step forward in innocent faith, and invites all to accept God's invitation to Light, awakening, and the realization of their deepest potentials. | The winds of change are coming. Are you willing to accept what is coming with joy, and be the change that God wishes for all humanity to be? |
| [Sins of the Parents](messages/2018/04/2018-04-03-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑04‑03 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke responds to a question about the biblical concept of sins being visited upon future generations, explaining in detail how conditions of fear, anger, confusion, and error are transmitted from parent to child beginning in the womb. He teaches that these inherited conditions accumulate over thousands of years of human history, but that the power of Divine Love is the great healer that can break the chain - washing through the soul, cleansing conditions, and empowering each soul to step out of the inherited darkness and into Light. | You chose Light. You chose to step away from the conditions so steadfast in your world. This is a testimony to the strength of your soul |
| [A Great Journey Awaits](messages/2018/05/2018-05-04-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑04 | Letters from History, Service & Mission |  | Yogananda speaks personally to one member of the circle, affirming that God has orchestrated every experience of his life to bring him to this point of readiness for service. He promises a great journey ahead - as teacher, healer, wanderer, and minstrel - drawing parallels to his own journey from India to America, and assuring this soul that many celestial helpers will accompany him as the path opens and revelation follows revelation. | Everything has led to this point. From this point many things will flow in harmony. You will not have to struggle to find your way - the path will open |
| [Walk in Harmony With God's Will](messages/2018/05/2018-05-09-af-alec-gaunt.md) | Alec Gaunt | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑09 | Mind & Soul, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Alec Gaunt teaches that knowing God's Will requires not effort and exertion but faith, peace, patience, and trust, and that life is a creative cooperation between human choice and God's Will rather than a preordained script. He draws on his own Earth life experience, confessing that he pushed too hard and passed into spirit sooner than he should have, urging those gathered to walk the fine line of balance between self-will and God's Will with greater patience and wisdom than he managed. | Life is not preordained. It is a cooperation between you and God - a creative flow that combines your choice and God's Will together in harmony |
| [Change Comes One Soul at a Time](messages/2018/05/2018-05-10-af-gandhi.md) | Mahatma Gandhi | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑10 | Awakening Humanity, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Gandhi responds to the group's contemplation of the world's darkness and inequities, teaching that true change in the world begins with the individual soul and its reconciliation with God. He draws on his own Earth life, speaking of how one step led to another as he followed God's guidance, and urges those gathered not to be overwhelmed by the complexity of the world's problems but to trust that their awakening souls will reveal the role they must play. | You look at all the dilemmas of this world and throw up your arms. But it is your awakened soul that will find the role you must play. One step at a time |
| [This Is a Place of Refuge](messages/2018/05/2018-05-11-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑11 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine blesses a physical gathering place as a refuge ordained by God for many to come and receive His Love. He calls those gathered to continue opening their doors to all who seek solace and peace, to encourage others to pray and join their circles of Light, and to trust that all pain and heartache will fall away as the power of God's Love continues its deep healing work within them. | Open your doors. Let those who come feel the peace. In time they will carry this Light and create their own refuge wherever they are |
| [Law of Compensation: Natural Compared with the Divine Path](messages/2018/05/2018-05-12-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑12 | Two Paths, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke delivers a detailed teaching on the Law of Compensation, explaining the two distinct ways in which the soul's accumulated conditions of darkness must be reconciled. On the natural love path, each condition must be consciously addressed one by one. On the Divine Love path, God's Essence acts as a powerful healing force that neutralizes these conditions reflexively, bringing forgetfulness rather than reliving. He contrasts the sixth sphere of natural love with the Celestial Kingdom, and teaches that at-onement with God is only possible through the Divine Love path. | The Law of Compensation insists that every dark condition in your soul be reconciled and brought to Light. Divine Love does this not consciously but as a reflexive response to God's Touch within you |
| [60/40 Soul Mind Guidance](messages/2018/05/2018-05-17-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑17 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine clarifies a previous message in which he gave a 60/40 soul/mind ratio as guidance, explaining that the goal is not a fixed percentage but the dominance of soul consciousness over the mind - not replacing it. Using the metaphor of mixing yellow and red paint to make a sunset orange, he teaches that the soul and mind must work together with the soul as the predominant factor, and that this harmonious intermingling deepens perception, opens soul faculties, and brings a new way of being in the world. | The goal is not soul or mind. It is a beautiful orange - predominantly soul, but with the mind mixed in to create something harmonious and whole |
| [Make Arrangements to Come Together](messages/2018/05/2018-05-20-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑20 |  |  | Keea atta Kem encourages the circle to make concrete arrangements to come together physically, teaching that while individual spiritual development continues in each soul's daily life, there are gifts and awakenings that can only be forged when the group gathers in the flesh - for the spiritual melding of souls in physical proximity multiplies the possibilities of upliftment far beyond what is possible apart. | When you are together in love and harmony, sitting and praying in the flesh, the possibilities of awakening are far greater than when you are apart |
| [Awaken to the Greater Love](messages/2018/05/2018-05-21-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew opens with a prayer of blessing for those gathered, then affirms that each soul is drawn to seek the greater Love of God by the longings of the soul itself. He encourages those gathered to drink deeply of God's blessings in this moment of prayer, reminding them that God's Love is always available, never withheld, and that as the soul awakens it will come to know God in a rich and full understanding. | Those parts of you that have lain dormant for many years are now eager for the light of day. They come from your soul |
| [Live Each Day in the Flow of God's Will and Love for You](messages/2018/05/2018-05-28-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑28 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew blesses those gathered with the assurance that the world is opening to them, that God will carry them to many places to bring Light and Truth, and urges them to release all restrictions and concerns about the future and simply live each day in the flow of God's Will and Love. | Do not place before you any restrictions as to where God will take you. Live each day in the flow and beauty of His Will |
| [Be Part of the Plan for the Salvation of Mankind](messages/2018/05/2018-05-28-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑28 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses those gathered, affirming that they are part of God's great plan for the salvation of mankind and a growing association of souls of Light that is coalescing into a movement to push back darkness. He assures them that each prayer to be used as an instrument of God's Will is answered, that each step forward brings them to a higher place of knowing, and that God's Hand is surely upon them and will never leave. | You just begin this journey. And yet already you are part of a great association of souls of Light coalescing into a movement that will push back the darkness |
| [Receiving the Love of God Brings Both Pain and Joy](messages/2018/05/2018-05-28-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑05‑28 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew traces the soul's journey from the natural awareness of childhood, through its burial under layers of conditioning, fear, and mental patterns, to the path back through prayer and emotional release. He teaches that the soul cannot be known through mental processes but only through heartfelt longing directed toward God, and that when the soul is finally allowed to open, waves of grief, longing, and desire will reach God and receive in return a healing and awakening beyond anything the mind can produce. | The innocent child knows its own soul naturally. Then the world buries it. Your whole spiritual journey is simply learning to find it again |
| [Transitioning from Mind to Soul](messages/2018/06/2018-06-04-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑04 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine responds to a question by explaining the confusion and discomfort of the transition from mind-dominated to soul-dominated awareness. He teaches that within each person are two minds - one of the soul and one of the material mind - and that as the soul grows stronger, conflict arises in the in-between place where they collide. He urges those gathered to recognize this conflict as a sign of readiness, not failure, and to take the leap of faith toward soul dominance that God is inviting them to make. | The soul is stronger. The soul knows. And the soul needs to forge ahead - to realize its purpose in this life, and to serve God in Love |
| [The Blessing of a Shield of Light](messages/2018/06/2018-06-06-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑06 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus announces that each member of the circle has received a unique blessing of a shield of white and golden Light from God, enveloping and protecting them as they carry Light into the world. He assures them this gift will never leave them but will grow and expand with each prayer and act of service, helping them to be in the world but not of the world, and enabling the angels to work through them more effectively. | You have each received a unique blessing - a shield of Light that envelops you. It will never leave you, and it will grow |
| [Seek to Know God Through Love](messages/2018/06/2018-06-09-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑09 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | John the Beloved speaks to a gathering that includes seekers from afar, teaching that just as bees seek nectar, the soul longs for God's Love to sustain it. He calls those gathered to lay down the preconceptions of the mind and allow God to touch the soul directly, promising that as the soul awakens in Love, even the mind will be satisfied and appeased by the Truths that emerge. He closes with God's personal invitation to each soul: will you accept my Love? | 'God places His Hand upon you and asks: Will you accept my Love? Even when your soul truly knows me, I shall continue to bless you' |
| [All Truth Begins with the Soul Awakened in Love](messages/2018/06/2018-06-09-af-john-wesley.md) | John Wesley | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑09 | Letters from History, Mind & Soul, Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching, Historical, Spirit Biography | John Wesley, founder of Methodism and now an inhabitant of the Celestial Kingdom, speaks urgently about humanity's need to awaken from the illusions of the mind before it is too late. He teaches that the material mind cannot solve the great dilemmas of humanity, that all truth begins with Love, and that only the soul awakened in Divine Love can truly perceive God's Creation and become an instrument of change in the world. | All Truth begins with Love. For Love is what makes the universe what it is. It brings life |
| [The Soul Longs for the Touch of God](messages/2018/06/2018-06-09-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑09 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew speaks to a gathering that includes newcomers, teaching that though each person may have a different mental explanation for why they have come, the truth is that the soul itself has drawn them - quietly seeking the Source of all, compelled by a longing so deep the mind often cannot name it. He urges those gathered to recognize this longing, nurture it consciously in prayer, and trust that seeking God above all else will bring every other blessing in its wake. | The soul seeks until it finds. It quietly goes about its business, seeking the Source of all. And it has brought you here |
| [The Reality of the Soul Can Be Merged with the Mind](messages/2018/06/2018-06-18-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑18 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew teaches that within each person are two minds - the material mind and the soul mind - each perceiving a different reality. The material mind is shaped by the thought conditions of the world and the five senses, while the soul mind is ignited and sustained by Divine Love. He calls those gathered to be scientists of the soul, accepting the challenge of merging these two realities into a new and more complete perception of God's Creation - and assures them that the veil will lift and the true reality will take form as the soul continues to awaken. | You are scientists of the soul, discovering its mysteries. The vanguards of a new dawn of Love and Truth that God intends for this world |
| [Seek Humility and Compassion for Self and Others](messages/2018/06/2018-06-24-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑24 | Mind & Soul, Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke responds to a question from one in the circle, delivering a searching and compassionate teaching on judgment, humility, and the courage required for radical self-honesty. He teaches that when we perceive error in another and respond with judgment rather than compassion, we are falling into the mind's patterns of superiority - and that the path forward requires deep honesty about our own conditions, the willingness to bare our hearts to one another, and trust that God's Love will heal everything we are willing to bring to Him. | When another hurts you, the most powerful response is forgiveness. When you react intensely to another's behaviour, that condition lives in you too - and their gift is to show you |
| [Release Judgment, Embrace Love](messages/2018/06/2018-06-26-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑06‑26 | Mind & Soul, Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew continues the theme of Luke's previous message, teaching that beneath judgment and anger almost always lies a deep hurt of feeling unloved and unrecognized. He teaches that authentic love cannot be performed while carrying hidden resentment, that this gap between surface and inner reality is why the world is so dark, and that each day God places before each soul the test and opportunity to choose love over the old patterns of the mind - one rung at a time up the ladder of Light. | You will know when you have passed the test. When you gaze upon one who has challenged you and find love, compassion, and forgiveness - you have become stronger in Light |
| [A Blessing from Mary](messages/2018/07/2018-07-02-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary blesses those gathered who carry responsibilities for the elderly, children, and those who are weak, promising to be with them as they serve. She calls them to drink deeply from the living waters of God's Love in prayer, to carry one another, and to trust that God's supply of Love is unlimited and available to all who simply ask with a humble, clear longing from the soul. | So much can be given with a simple, humble, clear longing from your soul. Merely ask |
| [Angels Accompany All Who Seek God's Love](messages/2018/07/2018-07-07-af-aaron.md) | Aaron | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑07 |  |  | Aaron, the biblical High Priest and brother of Moses, blesses a gathering that appears to include a birthday or special celebration, affirming that God's Hand rests upon all who seek Light and that angels accompany every soul who desires Truth and Love. He calls those gathered to express love freely in everything they do, to seek God with each day, and to trust that no one who seeks God's Love is ever alone. | For those who seek this truth of love, you shall always be accompanied by an angel who will protect and guide, teach and inspire |
| [Choose to Awaken Your Soul Through Prayer for Divine Love](messages/2018/07/2018-07-08-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑08 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew, identifying himself as Al Fike's guide of many years, blesses a gathering at the First United Spiritualist Church in Burnaby, inviting those present to open themselves to the gift of Divine Love. He teaches that this Love surrounds every soul but can only enter with an invitation, and that each earnest prayer and longing builds the eternal flame within the soul, awakening many gifts and aspects of the true self. | This Love is all around you. It only needs an opening - a desire, a prayer - to come within you |
| [Soul Awakening](messages/2018/07/2018-07-09-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑09 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary pours out a blessing of encouragement upon those gathered in their sanctuary, affirming that with each day a little piece of darkness falls away and greater Light enters. She calls them to allow God to direct their path rather than following mindful ideals, promising that as the soul awakens they will see more clearly how God guides them in service - and that they are learning to be one of God's angels in this world. | Allowing God to direct you is a profound act of humility and faith. Allow Him to guide you forth and bring you upon those shores where hungering souls await |
| [Awakening of Your Gifts Requires God's Love, Faith and Timing](messages/2018/07/2018-07-13-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑13 | Prism of the Soul |  | Keea atta Kem teaches that as souls gather and build light together, God is able to use this collective energy to bring blessings to those connected to them - including souls who long without knowing it. She cautions against the mind's eagerness and ambition interfering with soul gift development, teaching that gifts must unfold in harmony with God's timing and Will, and that the feeling of harmony within is the reliable guide for knowing when one is in the right flow. | You only see the tip of the iceberg. As you pray together, you activate blessings going out to many others whose souls are longing - though their minds may not know it |
| [Soul Expiation Through Pursuit of Truth, Release of Error](messages/2018/07/2018-07-14-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑14 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a compassionate teaching on the rhythm of soul expiation, explaining that the journey of soul awakening alternates between times of great joy and times when hidden conditions rise to the surface to be released. He teaches that the difficult times are when the greatest progress is made, that the angels act as midwives in this process, and that the new birth of the soul - though it brings pain and heartache - leads to a permanent joy and peace that is not dependent on outer conditions. | When you look back upon your lives, you will feel as much gratitude for the difficult times as for the times of joy. It is in the difficult times that the greatest progress is made |
| [Your Efforts Are Blessed Ten Times Over](messages/2018/07/2018-07-15-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑15 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine encourages all who have committed to bringing the Truth of God's Love to the world, assuring them that even the smallest effort is blessed ten times over by God. He calls them not to judge those who mix error with truth in their service, affirms the power of the bonds of love in the community, and urges them to be open and vulnerable with one another, for this engenders more love and light. | Any small effort you make, even in prayer, is blessed ten times over by God. This is the generosity of God's Love for you |
| [Forgiveness](messages/2018/07/2018-07-16-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑16 | Healing Path, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Andrew delivers a thorough teaching on forgiveness as one of the most important aspects of soul growth, teaching that the act of releasing others who have trespassed against you is a direct measure of the soul's progression in Divine Love. He teaches that as God infills the soul with His Love, the urge to forgive comes reflexively, that forgiveness and compassion come together in true soul awakening, and that holding on to resentment and judgment holds the soul's progression back. | Even a measure of forgiveness, no matter how small, is greater than all good deeds done in this world. It is the power of your decision from the soul to truly forgive that will change the world |
| [Be Brothers and Sisters in Love](messages/2018/07/2018-07-17-af-mary.md) | Mary | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑17 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary addresses a gathering of beloved daughters, urging them to strengthen the bonds of love amongst them and to resist the mind's tendency to create distance and judgment. She teaches that love grows exponentially when souls gather in unity, that loving oneself is the prerequisite for loving others, and that the world will see the power of God's Love made real through the harmony and unity of those who carry it. | You cannot love others more than you love yourself. Love flows outward in proportion to the love you carry within |
| [You Walk the Path of Love](messages/2018/07/2018-07-18-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑18 |  |  | Confucius opens with a tender image of souls flocking together like birds in God's Light, affirming that wherever they go God opens doors for them to share their stories of Love. He assures them that their souls committed to this path before birth, that God has carried them all their lives, and that as they continue to pray and reach upward, their wings will spread and their joy will rise ever higher into the ecstasy of God's Love. | My little birds, you will fly into the light of His Love, rising ever higher and higher, knowing the joy and the ecstasy of His Touch |
| [Death Can Be a Joyful Transitioning to Spirit](messages/2018/07/2018-07-19-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑19 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Matthew teaches that death is not an ending but a seamless and celebrated transition to the next phase of an eternal journey, and that fear of death arises from the mind's reliance on the five senses rather than the soul's deeper knowing. He traces the soul's eternal progression through the spirit spheres, teaching that Divine Love expands every faculty and gift of the soul without limit, propelling it toward ever-deeper at-onement with God. | The transition to the world of spirit will be celebrated — a changing of the conditions in which a soul lives and operates. It is nothing more than this |
| [Release Mind Patterns](messages/2018/07/2018-07-22-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑22 | Mind & Soul | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a searching teaching on the deeply ingrained thought patterns and habits of the mind that obstruct the soul's full expression of Love. He traces these patterns to childhood conditioning, explains how self-judgment compounds them, and teaches that only the combined power of disciplined awareness, prayer, and God's Touch can melt them away — freeing each soul to become a true and unobstructed channel of Divine Love in the world. | Are you willing to truly live this Love — not in half measure, not in three quarters measure, but in full measure? |
| [Prayer](messages/2018/07/2018-07-30-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑30 |  | Core Teaching | Keea Atta Kem delivers a comprehensive teaching on prayer as the primary vehicle of the Divine Love path, the language of the soul and the act of faith that opens a thread of light to God. She teaches that prayer need not be long or complicated, only heartfelt and soul-directed, and that as Divine Love accumulates within the soul, prayer becomes easier, awareness deepens, and the conscious knowing of God's presence grows. | Prayer is your vehicle. Prayer opens the door. Prayer is the language of the soul |
| [The Awakening Soul](messages/2018/07/2018-07-30-mc-augustine.md) | Augustine | Maureen Cardoso | 2018‑07‑30 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches that as Divine Love accumulates drop by drop in the soul through sincere prayer and longing, the soul awakens — cleansing conditions that once clung to it and replacing them with God's permanent Essence. He describes the harmonization that gradually emerges between the awakening soul and the material mind, and calls each listener to give their soul a voice, trusting that as the soul grows stronger it will transform how they see, speak, and move through the world. | You see with the eyes of your soul-love, you speak with the words of your soul-love, you touch with the gentleness of your soul in love |
| [A Special Blessing Given](messages/2018/07/2018-07-31-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑31 |  |  | Confucius blesses a group preparing to go out into the world, assuring them they are protected, that many doors are opening, and that a special gift is given at this moment to strengthen and propel them on their path. He promises that as they carry the Truth beyond the measure of their own lives, they will quench the thirst of many souls. | Many, many doors are opening. Walk willingly into this lighted passage of service and many blessings and miracles will follow in your stead |
| [You Are at a Turning Point in Your Service to God](messages/2018/07/2018-07-31-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2018‑07‑31 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus affirms a group of disciples that they stand at a turning point in their service to God, assuring them that the momentum they feel is real and that many roads are about to open. He calls them to allow their souls to feel the excitement of what is coming, to walk in faith, and to trust that each day will bring renewed opportunities and more powerful experiences of service as channels of love in the world. | Do you not feel the momentum building? Do you not feel the excitement within your souls as each day brings new blessings and new possibilities? |
| [Every Soul Is Unique and Flowers in the Truth of God's Love](messages/2018/08/2018-08-01-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑01 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew teaches that souls from every religious tradition who receive God's Love find their way to the Celestial Heavens, where each shines as a unique and magnificent flower in God's garden. He calls the circle to accept all seekers with love and embrace, to express their own unique soul truth with joy and confidence, and to trust that every soul which longs for God will find its way to Him in time. | When you come to the Celestial Heavens, you will see how each individual is like a magnificent flower in God's garden, unique and beautiful |
| [The Choice to Know God Is Yours to Take](messages/2018/08/2018-08-05-af-mark.md) | Mark | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑05 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mark, who identifies himself as guardian of the First United Spiritualist Church in Burnaby, speaks to a congregation of seekers about the soul's deep longing for God and the choice each soul must make to walk toward that longing. He teaches that every soul has a guardian angel, that God cannot compel a soul to pray but waits for its free choice, and that through prayer each soul may come to know the immeasurable Love that God holds for it. | God cannot beseech a soul to pray towards Him. God can only wait for your choice |
| [Trust in the Wisdom of the Soul](messages/2018/08/2018-08-06-af-solomon.md) | Solomon | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑06 | Mind & Soul |  | Solomon addresses a soul whose keen intellectual hunger has outpaced his trust in the soul's deeper knowing, teaching that truth does not come through mental speculation but drop by drop as God seeds the soul through prayer and love. He calls this soul to discipline the mind's restless craving, go to God with the innocence of a child, and trust that all answers, all wisdom, and all understanding will be delivered in God's time. | Give yourself up to your faith and trust in God and all things shall be delivered unto you, all answers, all knowings, all seeings, all understanding |
| [Confucius Blesses Us](messages/2018/08/2018-08-13-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑13 |  |  | Confucius pours out a blessing of peace and light upon the circle, assuring them that God withholds nothing from His children but waits for each soul to open and receive. He calls them to seek God's Touch completely and to know the peace that passes all understanding. | God does not withhold His Love and blessings from His children but beseeches each child to partake of what God has to give |
| [Growing the Light Within Your Souls Is the Greatest Service to God](messages/2018/08/2018-08-13-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑13 | Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem speaks urgently about the intensifying imbalance of the Earth and humanity's blindness to its causes, teaching that true solutions will not come from more inventions or structures but from each soul turning honestly inward and seeking God. He calls those who carry the Truth of Divine Love to pray earnestly, be examples of the awakened life, and trust that the light they build within themselves is the greatest service they can render to a suffering world. | No matter what situation you are in in your life, it is the light that you carry and the light that builds within you that will have the greatest effect |
| [Commentary on Earth Changes](messages/2018/08/2018-08-20-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑20 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine delivers a sober and wide-ranging teaching on the escalating imbalance of the Earth caused by humanity's accumulated lack of love, warning that the fires, floods, and upheavals visible in the world merely foreshadow what is coming. He assures the circle that God has a vast plan for the salvation of mankind already in motion, that those who have nourished their souls in Divine Love will be protected and will lead others through the transition, and that prayer with faith and joy is the single most important action each soul can take. | Pray with faith and joy. For it is in this opening and joyful acknowledgment of God that the power required to heal your world will come |
| [Jesus' Welcome to the Divine Love Mediumship Retreat](messages/2018/08/2018-08-25-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑25 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus welcomes a gathering of souls come together to explore mediumship and service, blessing each one and affirming that their special gifts are being awakened through prayer. He calls them to carry truth wherever they go, stand tall as beacons of light, and walk the path God has destined for them just as his disciples did, carrying the message of love to the world. | Each of you carries special gifts, great potentials that are being awakened with your prayers for the Father's Love |
| [Awakening Our Souls](messages/2018/08/2018-08-27-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑27 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that none who walk this Earth yet perceives truth clearly, because from birth humanity absorbs the creation of man rather than the creation of God, and the mind filters the soul's deeper knowing. He calls the circle to have compassion for themselves and one another in this shared condition, to remain open to the reality that today's understandings will not be tomorrow's, and to trust that as the Father's Love flows in, the river of God's Essence will dissolve error and bring soul and mind into ever-deepening alignment with truth. | You are indeed wading into that river and that river cleanses, pulls those things that are upon you, encrustations and error, away and dissolves these things in Love |
| [Have Laughter in the Seriousness of Learning Spiritual Things](messages/2018/08/2018-08-28-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑28 |  |  | Goldie arrives with a gentle tease for the more serious spirits, reminding the circle that joy makes all learning come alive. She calls them to laugh freely, delight in one another's unique beauty, and trust that joy itself draws the soul closer to God. | Create the joy and know that joy brings you close to God |
| [Elevate Your Gifts through Divine Love](messages/2018/08/2018-08-28-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑28 |  | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem distinguishes between natural spiritual gifts developed on the natural love path and those same gifts elevated and transformed by Divine Love. He teaches that every soul is born with gifts and may develop them without Divine Love, but that when the soul is ignited by God's Essence those gifts are lifted into a higher dimension of expression, in greater harmony with the laws of creation. He urges the gathering to seek Divine Love above all else and to trust that their gifts will flourish in the one desire for the highest. | Seek God above all else and your gifts will flourish in this one desire for the highest |
| [A Declaration Proclaiming the Beginning of a New Era of Light](messages/2018/08/2018-08-29-af-isaiah.md) | Isaiah | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑29 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Isaiah delivers a sweeping prophetic declaration that God is actively infecting the world with Love, pouring His Light into every part of humanity to create surprising and powerful change. He proclaims the end of the era of man's inhumanity and the dawning of a new era of Light, in which the clarion call of God will reverberate within every soul on Earth, giving each the choice to awaken or fall away, and calling those gathered to step forward as harbingers of Truth and Love in the days to come. | The clarion call of God will reverberate within the souls of mankind, and each soul will be given the choice to awaken or to fall away |
| [Jesus, I Am With You](messages/2018/08/2018-08-29-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑29 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus brings a tender and intimate assurance that he is present with each soul in every moment of their journey, whether in struggle, discovery, or prayer. He offers himself as the lantern bearer on the path to at-onement, promising to light the way through the illusions of the world and into the wonderment of God's Creation and the power of His Love. | Follow me to at-onement with God and I shall lead the way. I shall light the lantern of truth for all those who so desire to follow upon this path of Love |
| [What Brings Divine Love Mediumship](messages/2018/08/2018-08-29-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑29 |  | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem continues his discourse on Divine Love mediumship, teaching that while the basic laws of spirit communication are the same whether one walks the natural love path or the Divine Love path, the presence of Divine Love in the soul fundamentally transforms the quality, clarity, and depth of that communication. He explains the mechanics by which the soul's awakening in Divine Love reshapes the mind's gifts and faculties, deepens rapport with Celestial angels, and opens unique and powerful conduits of communication for each soul according to their own gifts. | Do not measure your progress but be attuned to your soul each day, with deep appreciation of the experience you have in the moment |
| [Circles of Light](messages/2018/08/2018-08-30-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑08‑30 |  | Core Teaching | Keea Atta Kem answers questions about Circles of Light, revealing in remarkable detail the many layered activity that takes place when souls gather in sincere prayer for Divine Love. She describes the portal of light that forms, the angels who stand behind each sitter, the spirits from many spheres who are drawn to listen and learn, and the chemistry that angels share among those present. She teaches that these circles are among the most powerful conduits of God's blessings available in the world, benefiting mortals and spirits alike, and urges all to continue creating and sustaining them. | Each soul in the circle is supported by an angel who stands behind them, with their hands upon them in prayer |
| [The Awakening of Your Souls Brings the Message of Truth to Humanity](messages/2018/09/2018-09-01-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑01 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that every soul carrying Divine Love sends out a signal of light into the world like a tolling bell, awakening a deep longing for God in those around them even when nothing is said. He calls the circle to walk confidently in the world, releasing mental restrictions and judgment, trusting that God's Touch upon them is a magnetism that draws others naturally, and that as the soul awakens the natural outcomes are service, love, truth, compassion, humility, and wisdom. | As you walk in the world a bell tolls with your presence, calling your brothers and sisters to prayer, stimulating that part of their souls that longs for God |
| [You Are Ready to Step Forward](messages/2018/09/2018-09-01-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑01 | Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem announces that a deep change is coming to the circles as gifts develop and doors open for wider service in the world. He calls each soul to prepare by deepening their connection with God, aligning mind and soul, and trusting that what has been years in preparation is now very close to fruition. He assures them that though the work will begin small and humble, it will grow as they persist in faith, and that each of them will find their unique role in the coming Dawn of Love. | You are on the verge of great transformation, not only personally but in this world. You will know a great joy as God's plan unfolds and you awaken to a new dawn, the Dawn of Love |
| [Seek to Know God's Love](messages/2018/09/2018-09-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑02 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew blesses a spiritualist church congregation, affirming that God's presence fills the place and that Divine Love is available to every soul without restriction, needing only to be asked for. He calls those gathered to build their foundation on Truth, to receive the gift of God's Love that heals all conditions, and to give generously of themselves, knowing that Divine Love will expand and empower all their gifts. | Seek to know God in this way and an entire universe will open to you |
| [The Hierarchy of Heaven](messages/2018/09/2018-09-08-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑08 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine responds to a question about the hierarchy of Heaven, confirming that non-human angelic forces created by God do exist beyond the Celestial Angels, assigned to oversee the workings of creation rather than the welfare of individual souls. He teaches that such deeper truths cannot be comprehended without the soul faculties opened by Divine Love, and gently redirects the circle toward simplicity, urging them to focus on their souls, their relationship with God, and the truths they are currently able to absorb. | Simplicity, my beloveds, simplicity is the key. Do not overtax yourselves with mindful considerations that do not lead to greater understanding |
| [Awaken Your Gifts Through Love](messages/2018/09/2018-09-12-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑12 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine blesses a gathering in Phoenix after a time of deep healing, affirming that the healings received will strengthen bodies, open gifts, and bring wisdom for the years of service ahead. He calls each soul to continue in prayer, sow seeds of truth in their communities, and allow the gifts God has given them to awaken and expand, as great Circles of Light spread out into the world to bring hope and truth to those who are lost. | Allow these gifts that God has given you and will ignite within your soul to expand and be expressed and come awake within you |
| [You Are Channels of Light and Love](messages/2018/09/2018-09-12-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑12 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus blesses a gathering in Phoenix, affirming that each soul present walks in light and has a great capacity to teach and be the truth. He calls them to carry their light into the world as his disciples, to walk with heads high and hearts open, and to reach out to one another for strength and assurance as they walk the Path Divine together, with Jesus carrying the lantern ahead of them. | I walk ahead of you carrying the lantern of truth as you follow along this Path Divine. I am with you and I shall never leave |
| [We Will Be with You](messages/2018/09/2018-09-14-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑14 |  |  | Confucius cautions the circle about the spiritual risks of moving among those who are psychically gifted but not soulfully grounded, teaching that such souls may take as much as they give and that discernment is essential. He assures them that the angels are always present to protect and uphold them, and calls them to keep their guides in consciousness and prayer as they navigate this environment as part of their God-given work. | You are my little birds and I keep you in my nest of love, beloveds |
| [Awaken Others to the Purpose of Life](messages/2018/09/2018-09-14-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑14 |  |  | Seretta Kem places the circle's work in perspective alongside the dramatic manifestations of other mediums, teaching that Divine Love carries people beyond mere recognition that life continues to an understanding of its true purpose. He assures them that seeds, bridges, and conditions are being laid in ways they cannot yet see, and that as their souls grow stronger, the work will begin in earnest. | You are the emissaries of truth, spoken not in words but in light and love |
| [Augustine Comments on the Perspective of Many Who Attended the AREI Conference](messages/2018/09/2018-09-15-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑15 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine reflects on the circle's experience at the AREI conference, distinguishing between the mind-centred understanding of spiritually gifted people and the deeper knowing available only to the soul enlivened by Divine Love. He teaches that those who pursue truth through the mind alone are limited, no matter how gifted, and assures the circle that they carry an ancient truth that will one day astound the very souls they have been sitting with, as the science of the soul exceeds even the greatest science of the mind. | You are the innovators, beloveds, even though this truth is ancient. You are bringing to these scientifically-inclined individuals a greater science, the science of the soul |
| [Be Discerning, Wise and True to God's Will](messages/2018/09/2018-09-16-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑16 |  |  | Seretta Kem teaches the circle how to navigate the magnetic pull of souls drawn to their light, distinguishing between those they are truly meant to walk with, those who need acknowledging in love, and those who simply seek to draw light for their own benefit. He calls them to exercise discernment through the soul rather than the mind, to walk in innocent alignment with God's Will each day, and to trust that much of their deepest work is hidden but very real, planting seeds of truth soul to soul. | Much of the work you do is hidden but goes very deep as you plant seeds of truth, as God blesses many through you, soul to soul |
| [I Am with You As You Do the Father's Work](messages/2018/09/2018-09-22-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑22 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus offers a brief and intimate assurance that he walks beside those who teach the truth of the Father's Love, whispering guidance, blessing those present, and helping to find words that can break through the barriers of minds filled with inaccuracy and distortion, reaching the souls that long for this gift beneath. | I stand by your side. I whisper in your ear. I bless those who are with you |
| [Ask for the Angels' Help](messages/2018/09/2018-09-22-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑22 |  |  | Keea Atta Kem teaches that no soul can navigate the material world's distractions and barriers to prayer alone, and invites the circle to actively call upon the angels for help in adjusting their thinking, elevating their desires, and entering the flow of God's Love. She teaches that carrying love as one's calling acts as a catalyst for change within and around each soul, and urges all to be strong in the pursuit of spiritual alignment at a time when humanity's material advance has far outpaced its spiritual condition. | None of you can do this alone. Ask for us. Ask for the angels to assist you. Ask for God to continue to open your soul that you may be awakened in love |
| [Truth Comes Through the Soul Awakened by God's Love](messages/2018/09/2018-09-22-af-luke.md) | Luke | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑22 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Luke uses the striking image of a telescope turned backwards to illustrate how the mind, when applied to spiritual truth, sees a very small and distorted fragment of reality. He teaches that only the soul faculties, awakened by Divine Love, can perceive the vast universe of God's creation clearly, and calls those gathered to begin with prayer and longing rather than logic and deduction, trusting that in the innocence of that reaching out, true knowledge is born. | It is as if you wish to examine the moon with a telescope and you turn the telescope backwards. So it is with the mind seeking spiritual truth |
| [Celebrating Vicky's Passing Into the World of Spirit](messages/2018/09/2018-09-29-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑29 |  |  | Goldie arrives at a memorial service to bring lightness and joy, reframing the passing of a beloved friend named Vicky as a birth into the beautiful world of spirit. She calls those present to bring joy into their hearts and a spring into their step, celebrating life in all its forms, for if the world truly knew the beauty of God's creation all grief would melt into laughter. | If only more knew how beautiful and wonderful is God's creation, all that worry and concern would melt into joy and laughter |
| [Time to Speak the Truth](messages/2018/09/2018-09-30-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑09‑30 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine challenges the circle to move beyond meekness and speak the truth plainly, simply, and powerfully, teaching that silence in the presence of error is an acceptance of error. He draws on the example of Jesus as one who could not compromise the truth despite angry opposition, and calls those gathered to stand up as God's agents of change in a world that continues to slip deeper into materialism and spiritual slumber, trusting that the angels will inspire the right words when they ask. | Silence in the presence of error is an acceptance of error |
| [Go Naked to God in Joy](messages/2018/10/2018-10-04-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑04 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew teaches that the mind is the greatest gatekeeper to the soul, and that what we feed our minds determines how freely the soul can reach God in prayer. He calls the circle to stoke the fires of their souls with the urgency of a parched soul seeking living waters, to shed the tattered cloaks of earthly distraction, and to go naked to God in bare, joyful, unencumbered longing. | Release your cloaks, go naked to God, bare your souls. Be free of all that encroaches upon it and be with God. |
| [Celestials Dancing with Joy](messages/2018/10/2018-10-04-mc-goldie.md) | Goldie | Maureen Cardoso | 2018‑10‑04 |  |  | Goldie bursts in with irrepressible joy, reporting that the Celestial Heavens are dancing at the circle's great yearning and effort to delve into their souls. She affirms that each soul is sparkling with a greater clarity and passion, and promises to keep dancing around them always, elevating their thoughts and cheering them on with glitter and delight. | We in the Celestial Heavens are dancing with joy at your great yearning and passion. Your souls are sparkling. |
| [Walk in the Light](messages/2018/10/2018-10-08-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑08 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew calls the circle to the simple yet transformative act of prayer and longing for God's Love, teaching that this single act affects all things around them in subtle yet powerful ways. He assures them that the light they carry is destined to touch and ignite others, and that though the healing of the world is too great a task for any number of souls alone, God will enact it through every willing soul who opens themselves to His Love. | The lights flicker in the darkness. Those lights are destined to touch others, igniting others, bringing more light to this world. This is your destiny. |
| [The Integration of the Material Mind with the Soul Mind](messages/2018/10/2018-10-09-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑09 | Mind & Soul | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem delivers a detailed teaching on how the transformation wrought by Divine Love extends far beyond the soul itself, touching every cell, every system, and every aspect of consciousness. He explains the process by which the soul mind and material mind are gradually integrated into a single unified consciousness, and assures the circle that this merging, though not accomplished in an instant, is the goal of their journey and is already beginning to unfold within each of them. | As the soul and mind embrace in joyful recognition, they begin to merge until there is no sense of separation — only the singular consciousness of the soul mind and material mind as one. |
| [A Kaleidoscope of Light](messages/2018/10/2018-10-16-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑16 |  | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem describes the gifts of the soul as seeds in chambers, dry and dormant until God's Divine Love flows in like living water, germinating each one gradually. He teaches that every soul is utterly unique — like a diamond whose facets are its own, or a snowflake unlike any other — and that the kaleidoscope of light and colour expressed through each soul in prayer is too vast and ever-changing to be fully described. He calls the circle to trust the upward progression and accept with joy the wonderment of their ever-evolving being in God's Love. | An entire garden of gifts lays within your soul. As God brings His living waters in, the seeds germinate and the flora of your soul bears fruit that will nurture many others. |
| [Seek Harmony Through God's Love](messages/2018/10/2018-10-23-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑23 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew teaches that all of God's creation is drawn to harmony except the souls of mankind, whose free will and mind-dominated condition have created the disharmony visible in all the world's suffering. He distills the message for the world into three simple truths: seek harmony, seek harmony through love, seek love through God. He calls the circle to go out as examples of this truth, strong enough to discern what is of God and what is not, and to trust that as their souls grow in Divine Love they will find their way through the forest of error to the sunny meadows of peace. | Seek harmony. Seek harmony through love. Seek love through God. Such a simple message — and yet humanity is so far away from it. |
| [Seretta Kem Talks of the Service that May Come](messages/2018/10/2018-10-24-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑24 | Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem speaks prophetically of the service ahead, telling the circle they will be known in surprising places as word of their gifts spreads through a vast network of light workers being coordinated by God and angels. He describes a coming time when humanity's hunger for truth, love, and healing will intensify as materialism loses its hold, and calls each soul to accept their role with humility and faith, trusting the day-by-day flow of God's guidance rather than seeking fixed dates or certainties. | You are but one component of a vast network that is being built and will flourish with the hand of God upon it. |
| [Listen to Your Soul, Not the Illusions of Your Mind](messages/2018/10/2018-10-25-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑25 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches that many of the conditions troubling the circle are not of the soul but of the mind — patterns implanted by others and the world that masquerade as truth. He calls each soul to draw a firm line against darkness and self-hatred, to reject the illusions of the mind with the strength of free will, and to trust the awakening soul's truer perception of reality, knowing that God's Love will overshadow the darkness with light for all who long for this with their whole being. | Draw your line, beloved souls — your line against darkness and error, your line against self-hatred. I am a child of God and I shall live accordingly. |
| [Compassion as an Expression of Love for Self and Others](messages/2018/10/2018-10-25-af-martin-luther.md) | Martin Luther | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑25 |  |  | Martin Luther teaches that compassion is an attribute of the soul that wells up spontaneously when we see another with the eyes of love, and that it cannot truly flow outward until we first have compassion for ourselves. He teaches that compassion and humility are inseparable, that compassion is the Hand of God reaching through us to others, and that it is one of the most essential qualities for any soul called to be a channel of love in the world. | When you gaze upon another with eyes of love, compassion often accompanies your interaction. It is a signal that God is working through you — for this gift of compassion is the Hand of God reaching through you to others. |
| [The Value and Purpose of Your Soul](messages/2018/10/2018-10-29-af-paul-of-tarsus.md) | Paul of Tarsus | Al Fike | 2018‑10‑29 | Two Paths, Letters from History, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Paul of Tarsus explains the distinction between the natural love already within every soul and the higher Divine Love that must be sought through prayer and longing. He teaches that while the natural love path leads to the purification and joy of the sixth sphere, only Divine Love opens the way to the Celestial Heavens and true at-onement with God, transforming the soul beyond its natural capacities into something Divine. He urges all to accept the invitation of this wondrous journey without restriction or limitation. | Jesus said "seek ye the kingdom and all things shall come to you." His words refer to the blessing of Divine Love — for this creates the kingdom within your soul. |
| [God's Love Will Strengthen and Guide You Forward](messages/2018/11/2018-11-03-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑03 | The Saints & Apostles Speak, Awakening Humanity |  | Andrew teaches that true world change cannot come from human will or intellect alone, but only through souls awakened by Divine Love whose very expression becomes an agent of transformation. He calls the group to commit to their own soul awakening, assuring them that in alignment with God the effects of their lives will be exponential and that many gifts and abilities hidden within them await discovery. | You cannot change the world until you have allowed God to change you. |
| [As You Pray Together You Are a Channel of Love for Many](messages/2018/11/2018-11-03-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑03 |  |  | Confucius blesses the gathering with God's healing love, affirming that souls who pray together become a powerful channel of light and healing for the world, including those stricken with grief and in deep need. | When souls gather to pray, they become more than individuals — a living channel through which God's healing flows outward to a grieving world. |
| [Live the Truth of God's Love](messages/2018/11/2018-11-03-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑03 | Awakening Humanity, Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew calls the prayer circle to recognise the vast spiritual deprivation of humanity and their own call to service, urging them to live the truth of God's Love with each breath and declare it boldly to a world of souls who do not even know they have a soul. | The world is full of souls who do not know they have a soul, and you hold the key that could unlock their door. |
| [God Invites You to Awaken in His Love](messages/2018/11/2018-11-04-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑04 | Awakening Humanity, Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine encourages the gathering to pray fervently for the inflowing of Divine Love, assuring them that God has a great plan for the salvation of mankind and invites each soul to participate by opening themselves to His Love and stepping forward as a channel of truth, healing, and comfort in the world. | God's invitation to awaken is already within you; prayer is simply the act of saying yes. |
| [Goldie's Gift](messages/2018/11/2018-11-04-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑04 |  |  | Goldie brings a flower to each soul in the prayer circle as a token of God's love and spirit's love for them, assuring them that they are never alone and that God always provides an angel to light their way, comfort them, and inspire them to greater prayer. | Goldie brings a flower to remind you that you are loved — and that an angel walks beside you every step of the way. |
| [God's Love Will Nurture Your Soul](messages/2018/11/2018-11-04-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑04 | Healing Path |  | Keea Atta Kem urges the gathering to nurture their souls and seek the soothing balm of God's Divine Love, assuring them that this gift heals all within, dissolves worry and care, and is given freely to every soul who sincerely asks, regardless of their condition or place in the world. | A great ocean of God's Love is waiting for you - and all you need to do is ask. |
| [Many Blessings Flow From a Circle of Light](messages/2018/11/2018-11-05-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑05 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew explains the many dimensions of blessing that flow from a Circle of Light, including healing for those gathered, comfort and progress for departed loved ones who draw near in prayer, and God's Love flowing outward through the circle to touch countless souls in both the physical and spirit worlds. | When souls gather to pray, the blessings flow far beyond the room, touching the living, the departed, and the world they cannot see. |
| [Speak Up for Truth and Change](messages/2018/11/2018-11-05-af-john-wesley.md) | John Wesley | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑05 | Letters from History, Awakening Humanity, Service & Mission | Historical, Spirit Biography | John Wesley, now an inhabitant of the Celestial Kingdom, reflects on the limitations of his earthly ministry and the failure of institutional Christianity to teach the higher truth of God's Love.
