He calls the gathering to stand up with tenacity and courage, declaring the truth of the soul and Divine Love to a world mired in intellectual doctrine and the pursuit of power. | John Wesley reformed a church but never found the highest truth; now from the Celestial Kingdom he asks who will carry what he could not. |
| [The Struggle of the Material Mind to Be in Harmony With Love](messages/2018/11/2018-11-06-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑06 | Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches on the struggle between the material mind and the soul, urging the gathering to harmonize their thinking with the loving wisdom of their awakened souls. He addresses the habits of judgment, personal offence, and the desire to control others, calling each soul to the discipline of walking in love with every breath. | The soul already knows how to love; the lifelong work is teaching the mind to follow where the soul leads. |
| [Lotus Blossom Message from Oz](messages/2018/11/2018-11-14-af-lotus-blossom.md) | Lotus Blossom | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑14 |  |  | Lotus Blossom offers a brief healing blessing to those gathered in Sydney, encouraging them to pray before sleep and assuring them that she and many other spirits will attend to their physical and spiritual healing through the night. | The healing that begins in prayer does not stop when you sleep; spirits attend to you through the night. |
| [Open Your Minds and Souls to God's Guidance](messages/2018/11/2018-11-14-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑14 | Service & Mission |  | Seretta Kem speaks to a small group gathered in Sydney, explaining that their prayerful efforts together are creating a node of light in that part of the world, benefiting both physical and spirit souls. He encourages them to trust God's guidance, release the need to assess outcomes with the mind, and allow their individual gifts to unfold in harmony as God's channels of Love and Truth. | What looks like a modest gathering is, in God's hands, the planting of seeds whose fruit you may never see but others will taste. |
| [Yogananda Message from Oz](messages/2018/11/2018-11-14-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑14 | Letters from History |  | Yogananda greets the gathering in Sydney with warmth, promising to return soon to speak further about his earthly efforts and motivations. He affirms that all truth flows toward God and encourages the group to continue working together in love and light for the healing and harmony of humanity. | All truth, from every tradition and every era, flows in one direction: toward God. |
| [Have Faith That Your Soul Awakens](messages/2018/11/2018-11-15-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑15 | Mind & Soul |  | Confucius teaches that efforts for God must begin in the soul and rise as inspiration to the mind, not the reverse. He encourages the gathering to clear the obstructions between mind and soul, walk in faith without requiring clear understanding of what comes next, and trust that God has perfectly orchestrated every step of their journey toward awakening. | God does not wait for your mind to figure it out; He speaks first to the soul, and asks the mind to follow. |
| [Blessings Come When You Pray Together](messages/2018/11/2018-11-15-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑15 |  |  | Keea Atta Kem blesses a small group gathered in Sydney, affirming that spirits are working to develop the soul gifts of those present through their gathering together in prayer, and encouraging them in their prayerful mission ahead. | When souls gather to pray, spirits gather too, and the gifts within each soul are quietly, carefully drawn open. |
| [How to Bring the Truth to New Souls](messages/2018/11/2018-11-18-af-michael.md) | Michael | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑18 | Service & Mission |  | Michael, a Celestial spirit guiding two souls on a prayer mission in Sydney, teaches that the most powerful way to share Divine Love truth is through simplicity, authenticity, and the soul's own light — not argument or persuasion. He encourages patience, humility, and trust that God does the work of touching souls. | You do not need to convince anyone; you only need to show up in love, and let God do the rest. |
| [Divine Love Is the Link to Soul Awakening and Desire to Serve God](messages/2018/11/2018-11-18-mc-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Maureen Cardoso | 2018‑11‑18 | Awakening Humanity, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary encourages a prayer circle of seven to draw hope from the awakening of their own souls, reminding them that Divine Love is the key to healing their suffering and the link that will awaken them to serve God. She assures them that their radiant souls will naturally draw others to the truth, and calls them to continue walking home to God. | You already hold the key to your own suffering; every prayer is another step on the long, beautiful walk home to God. |
| [Rest and Pray to Replenish Yourself](messages/2018/11/2018-11-20-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑20 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew offers practical guidance to two men resting after a healing session, suggesting a day structured around three prayer sessions and rest so they may absorb spiritual blessings and open themselves to conscious soul awakenings. He speaks of angels building a portal of light at their location and urges them to give priority to spiritual work while the conditions are exceptionally favourable. | Stop. Rest. Pray. It is the most productive thing you can do right now. |
| [Natural Love versus Divine Love Soul Progression](messages/2018/11/2018-11-20-af-professor-salyards.md) | Professor Salyards | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑20 | Two Paths | Core Teaching | Professor Salyards delivers a detailed doctrinal comparison of the soul developed through natural love versus the soul transformed by Divine Love, explaining that while the natural love soul may attain a measure of wisdom and capacity, the Divine Love soul operates at an entirely different frequency, receiving truth as a gift from God rather than through intellectual effort, with no limit to its expansion. | The natural love soul wins truth through effort and intellect; the Divine Love soul receives it as a flower plucked in joy, no striving required. |
| [Encouragement to Continue With Plans](messages/2018/11/2018-11-21-af-gandhi.md) | Gandhi | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑21 | Service & Mission, Letters from History |  | Gandhi encourages a group of souls on a prayer mission to remain open to God's guidance for travel and service, reminding them that Jesus himself travelled widely in his ministry. He assures them that their light grows stronger with each day and that the time will come when their humble, loving presence will turn heads and bring acknowledgement. | You do not need to know the whole plan; you only need to stay close enough to God to hear the next step. |
| [On the Value of Building Portals of Light](messages/2018/11/2018-11-21-af-james.md) | James | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑21 | Service & Mission, The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | James explains the spiritual mechanics of portals of light, describing them as powerful conduits that allow spirit to connect more readily with the material world, bring healing energies, and clear darkness. He encourages the group to follow their guidance in travel so that their prayers and presence may anchor these portals across the world as part of the growing lattice of light. | You are one end of the bridge; spirits are the other, and your prayers are the cables that hold it all together. |
| [Being a Channel of God's Love Requires Taming the Mind and Exemplifying the Soul](messages/2018/11/2018-11-21-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑21 | Mind & Soul, Letters from History |  | Yogananda teaches that becoming a true channel of God's Love requires integrating the light of the soul with the conditions of the mind, not waiting passively for prayer to do all the work. He calls the group to actively discipline their mental patterns, release judgment, and take responsibility for aligning their thoughts and expressions with love. | Prayer opens the soul, but only you can tame the mind that stands between the soul's light and the world that needs it. |
| [Speak of Simple Truth](messages/2018/11/2018-11-22-af-michael.md) | Michael | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑22 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths |  | Michael, a Celestial spirit who describes himself as a man who struggled greatly in life but found his way to God, teaches that the root of humanity's disharmony lies in its reverence of the mind over the soul. He calls those gathered to speak simply and directly of the power of prayer and the soul's relationship with God as the one key that opens transformation, healing, and alignment with the Creator. | Prayer is not preparation for the revolution of the soul. It is the revolution. |
| [Yogananda Describes His Journey Through the Spheres Towards the Celestial Heavens](messages/2018/11/2018-11-22-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑22 | Two Paths, Letters from History | Spirit Biography | Yogananda gives a first-person account of his journey through the spirit spheres after passing, describing how he progressed from the 4th sphere through to the Celestial Kingdom after releasing his deeply held Eastern religious beliefs. He describes the bliss of the Celestial Heavens as beyond anything experienced in earthly or natural love spheres, and commits to working with the group to bring truth to humanity. | Yogananda knew the bliss of meditation and the peace of the natural heavens, and says neither compares to one moment in God's Love. |
| [An Invitation to a Beginners Group in Fitzroy Falls](messages/2018/11/2018-11-25-af-michael.md) | Michael | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑25 |  |  | Michael introduces himself to a group of seekers in Fitzroy Falls, describing his own journey of soul transformation through Divine Love and issuing a warm invitation to all present to accept the one gift that God gives without limit. He assures them that celestial spirits are eager to assist any soul who sincerely asks, and that the gifts already present among those gathered will be magnified exponentially by the inflowing of God's Love. | Ask. Open. Receive. That is all. |
| [Clarification on the Existence of Jesus](messages/2018/11/2018-11-26-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑26 | Jesus Speaks | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Jesus speaks directly about the widespread impersonation of his name in the spirit world, explaining that many well-meaning mediums are influenced by spirits who misrepresent themselves without realising it. He affirms his own existence as a Celestial spirit, teaches that only awakened soul faculties can discern true from false influence, confirms he will never return in the flesh, and identifies himself as the first soul to enter the Celestial Kingdom. | Many speak in his name who are not him. Only the awakened soul can tell the difference. |
| [All Truth Comes from the Soul](messages/2018/11/2018-11-28-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑28 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths | Core Teaching | Augustine addresses the group after a lively and controversial discussion, teaching that the spirit world is filled with spirits who have constructed their own realities through the power of thought and believe they have found complete truth. He distinguishes between the material mind's speculative grasp of truth and the soul mind's direct absorption of truth as a blessing of Divine Love, urging the group to test all ideas against the knowing of the soul rather than the constructs of the mind. | The mind builds its own truth. The soul simply receives it. Only prayer opens the deeper channel. |
| [The Power of Prayer](messages/2018/11/2018-11-29-af-abdullah-latif.md) | Abdullah Latif | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑29 | Letters from History | Core Teaching | Abdullah Latif, a philosopher and mathematician from the Middle East now residing in the Celestial Kingdom, teaches that prayer is only as effective as the love, wisdom, and purity of intention behind it. He warns that prayers rooted in anger, fear, or the assumptions of the mind go no further than the breath, and calls those present to first come close to God and know their own souls before seeking to change the world through prayer. | You cannot change the world from outside what you have not yet changed within. |
| [Challenging Earth Changes Bring Greater Light and Harmony to Humanity](messages/2018/11/2018-11-29-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑11‑29 | Awakening Humanity | Prophecy | Augustine speaks plainly about the coming transformation of the Earth, warning that the structures of materialism humanity depends on for comfort will crumble as God's great plan for the healing and rebalancing of the world unfolds. He calls those gathered to build their faith and spiritual strength now so they may not only navigate what is coming but guide others through it, and assures them that in place of material loss will come a simpler life of deep peace, love, and harmony with God. | The bells are already pealing. Those walking in God's Love will find their way through. |
| [All Truth Comes from the Soul: Part 2](messages/2018/12/2018-12-02-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2018‑12‑02 | Mind & Soul, Two Paths | Core Teaching | Augustine continues his teaching on truth and the soul mind, examining how humanity's scientific and materialist framework constructs reality through the mind in ways that are fundamentally unstable and subject to manipulation. He calls those gathered to trust the slow birthing of their soul faculties, assuring them that a blending of the material mind and soul mind will come, bringing an authority and depth of perception that will draw others toward truth. | You live in a fog of the mind's own making. Beyond it is a reality the soul has always known. |

He teaches that a quiet day of prayer may reach more souls than any overt outreach effort, and calls those gathered to release judgment and fear, allowing God to bring whomever He intends close so they may be touched by love. | Every ordinary day is full of God's work. You just have to stay open. |

He teaches that for those who feel too weak to choose well, the answer is simply to pray and ask God and the angels for strength, and that in receiving that strength the choice becomes clear, joyful, and free of confusion. | Every morning God waits. What will you choose today? |

She calls those gathered to set aside mindful considerations during prayer and open the eyes of the soul, where God's Presence can truly be known and the joy of at-onement awaits. | What most people call inner awareness is the mind's creation. He calls those present to continue praying for this gift, trusting that their awakened souls will become powerful instruments of healing and change in the world. | Two roads. One leads to the perfection of the mind. The other leads to God. |

He assures them of his close presence and the protection and harmony of God's Love as they go forward in their work. | Few come to serve rather than receive. You are here. That is enough. |

She reflects on her own Earth life interest in spirit communication, contrasting the lower calibre of circles she encountered then with the high angelic presence here, and urges the group to continue their work as a rare and desperately needed light for a world full of lost souls. | She sat in séance rooms once. This is nothing like those rooms. |
| [All Have Some Ability to Communicate with Angels](messages/2019/01/2019-01-26-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑26 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew teaches that every soul has some capacity to sense, feel, and communicate with angelic presences, not just those with obvious gifts of clairvoyance. | [How Diverse Beliefs Can Be Unified](messages/2019/01/2019-01-26-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑26 | Awakening Humanity, Two Paths | Prophecy | Augustine responds to a question about how the world's diverse and conflicting perspectives can ever come into harmony. | [Establishing Portals](messages/2019/01/2019-01-26-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑26 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem gives a detailed teaching on Portals of Light — what they are, how they are established, who builds them, and what they accomplish. He explains that portals are mechanisms of concentrated blessing built by a team of spirits with God's sanction, that they cannot be constructed by human effort alone but are conferred in response to sincere prayer and commitment, and that Jesus ignited the foundation of each portal known to this group as a gift. | You cannot build it. You can only pray for it. And Jesus has already laid the foundation. |
| [Questions Answered about Divine Love Healing](messages/2019/01/2019-01-26-af-sri-yarisupta.md) | Sri Yarisupta | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑26 | Healing Path | Divine Healing | Sri Yarisupta answers a question about healing energies, teaching that the universe contains a vast rainbow of healing gifts and that attempting to define, narrow, or ritualise them limits what God can bring through an open channel. He affirms that every soul has some degree of healing gift, and that receiving the Divine Love widens and deepens all healing capacities beyond what the mind can currently imagine. | Stop defining it. Open the channel. Let God bring whatever colour of healing the soul before you needs. |
| [Mankind Has the Power to Create Its Own Reality](messages/2019/01/2019-01-27-af-abdullah-latif.md) | Abdullah Latif | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑27 | Letters from History, Awakening Humanity |  | Abdullah Latif teaches that the world's darkness and suffering is not God's creation but the cumulative result of humanity's free choices, each thought and action piling dark energy upon the Earth. He calls those gathered to have compassion for themselves as they struggle to hold light in an environment hostile to it, assuring them that thousands of spirits watch their efforts with admiration and hope. | God created a perfect world. Humanity created this one. The difference is free will, and the remedy is the same. |
| [Be Thankful and Joyful](messages/2019/01/2019-01-27-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑27 |  |  | Goldie gently chides the group for being too serious, reminding them that their lives are full of blessings and joy, and that she has been with them through the small intimate moments of the day, singing as one awoke, walking in the forest with another. She promises a special blessing of uplifting light and joyful presence each day they are together. | Goldie is not impressed by the doom and gloom. Count your blessings. She has been in them all day. |
| [Jesus Incarnated as a Complete Soul and Has No Other Half or Soulmate](messages/2019/01/2019-01-27-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑27 | Jesus Speaks | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Jesus directly addresses a question about Mary Magdalene as his soulmate, explaining that he came to Earth as a complete and singular soul rather than as half of a soul pair, by prior agreement with God, so that his particular mission could be fulfilled. He teaches that he has no soulmate, feels no lack in this, and continues to grow in God's Love and minister to humanity from the highest realms of the Celestial Kingdom. | Jesus walks alone and wants for nothing. His soulmate is God and his family is all of humanity. |
| [Sleep State Q & A](messages/2019/01/2019-01-27-af-john-the-beloved.md) | John the Beloved | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑27 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | John the Beloved delivers a detailed teaching on what the soul does during sleep, explaining that the spirit body travels, serves, meets other souls, and learns while the material mind rests. He takes questions from those gathered on topics including spirit clinics and educational places, setting intentions before sleep, the limitations of the silver cord, planning future events, resolving conflicts, cross-timezone meetings, and soul condition awareness in the sleep state. | You think sleep is rest. John the Beloved knows better: your soul has been busy all night. |
| [What's in a Name?](messages/2019/01/2019-01-27-af-sri-yarisupta.md) | Sri Yarisupta | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑27 |  |  | Sri Yarisupta clarifies a question about his name, explaining that Sri Yarigupta is his formal name while Sri Yarisupta is a childhood familiar name he chose to use as a sign of friendship. He teaches that names are not particularly important in the spirit realms where souls know one another by their presence, and graciously excuses any confusion arising from the medium's difficulty with unfamiliar names. | In the realms of light, names dissolve. What remains is simply the presence of a friend. |
| [How Can We Help Approach Scientists?](messages/2019/01/2019-01-28-af-albert-einstein.md) | Albert Einstein | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑28 | Letters from History |  | Einstein explains why spirits are so eager to work with this circle, noting that opportunities for communication with receptive mortals are rare. He reveals that those gathered will be guided to serve as intermediaries — connecting spirits in the higher realms with specific souls who have the potential to bring important scientific and spiritual truths to the world, as part of God's overarching plan. | Einstein is not looking for famous channels. He is looking for friends who can introduce him to the right souls. |
| [Questions Regarding Earth Changes](messages/2019/01/2019-01-28-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑28 | Awakening Humanity |  | Augustine addresses the group's desire for clear predictions about world events, honestly explaining why specific prophecy is difficult: the conditions of the world are erratic, the veil between the worlds distorts what is conveyed, and time itself is experienced differently in spirit. He calls those gathered to trust their inner compass, make plans without fear when guidance is clear, and be assured that God's plan for the salvation of mankind will not fail. | Augustine admits what few guides will: even from the highest vantage, the future is not a fixed map. Trust your compass. Walk in the light. God's plan will not fail. |
| [Releasing the Last Dark Vestiges in the Soul](messages/2019/01/2019-01-28-af-matthew-2.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑28 | Healing Path |  | Matthew speaks honestly to a group who desire healing but whose deepest wounds persist, teaching that the most tenacious conditions in the soul require either an intense, purposeful inner gaze — facing the dark chambers directly with prayer and courage — or patient accumulation of Divine Love over many years. He teaches that healing will come either way, but the choice of how quickly is the soul's own. | The last wounds are the deepest. Matthew asks if you are willing to go where so few are strong enough to look. |
| [What Is the Possibility of Soul Mates Meeting on Earth?](messages/2019/01/2019-01-28-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑28 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew speaks honestly about the difficulty of soul mates meeting and working together while on Earth, explaining that while the souls are drawn to one another, the vast differences in life experience and soul development create complex challenges. He teaches that this union is a great blessing when achieved but requires deep soul wisdom, significant effort, and a willingness to face real difficulties. | Half a soul finding its other half on Earth: rare, difficult, and when it happens, unlike anything else. |
| [Divine Love Is Yours for the Asking](messages/2019/01/2019-01-28-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑28 | Letters from History |  | Yogananda reflects on the loss of deep spiritual understanding in his homeland of India as material Western thinking spreads, expressing sorrow that the world is turning away from closeness to spirit. He then invites those gathered to drink deeply from the fountainhead of God's Love, which he did not fully understand in his Earth life but now knows, and affirms that this gift is available to all who come with innocence and sincere desire. | One of the great yogis of the twentieth century has come to tell you that what he taught on Earth was only the beginning of what he now knows. |
| [Does Every Soul Have a Purpose?](messages/2019/01/2019-01-29-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑29 | Prism of the Soul | Core Teaching | Augustine responds to a question about whether every soul has a purpose, teaching that God has imbued each soul with gifts, abilities, and an invitation to fulfil a unique role in His plan. He assures those gathered that their purpose is already within them, drawing them forward naturally like gravity, and that God has arranged every experience of their lives to prepare them for its full expression in Love. | Your purpose is not something you figure out. It is something already pulling you, like gravity toward the sea. |
| [Mary Magdalene Is Not Jesus' Soulmate](messages/2019/01/2019-01-29-af-mary-magdalene.md) | Mary Magdalene | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑29 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Mary Magdalene arrives to confirm the message recently received from Jesus, affirming that she was never his soulmate, wife, or lover — but a devoted follower and minister who loved him in innocence and gratitude. She discloses that she is now an inhabitant of the Celestial Kingdom and continues to follow his teachings with great joy. | She came to set the record straight. Two thousand years of myth, and the answer is simply: she was a grateful student. |
| [God Needs Us to Bring Truth](messages/2019/01/2019-01-29-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑29 | The Saints & Apostles Speak, Awakening Humanity |  | Matthew calls those gathered to continue their journey of soul awakening, reminding them that God needs willing souls who have been transformed by His Love to serve as beacons for others in a world where most sleep in ignorance of their own true nature. He assures them they are not walking alone and that God will heal their wounds, strip away their cloaks of pain, and provide all that is needed to persist and serve. | God is not waiting for the gifted or the perfect. He is waiting for the willing. |
| [How Can We Discern Truth When Messages from Different Mediums Contradict Each Other?](messages/2019/01/2019-01-30-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑30 | Jesus Speaks | Core Teaching, Historical | Jesus addresses a question about contradictory messages from different mediums, teaching that no medium is one hundred percent accurate and that the quality of communication depends heavily on the soul development of the instrument, the harmonisation of mind and soul, and the conditions created by those gathered. He discloses that Al Fike has a higher soul development than James Padgett had, endorses him as a designated channel, and teaches that truth must always be tested against the inner spirit of truth within each soul. | Jesus gives the only reliable compass for navigating a world full of contradictory messages: go to God, and ask the spirit of truth within your own soul. |
| [Thank You for Your Efforts in Prayer](messages/2019/01/2019-01-30-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑30 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Matthew closes a gathering of prayer and Q&A with gratitude, reminding the group that the answers to all their questions lie within their own awakening souls and that as they grow in God's Love, greater and higher truths will become available to them. He promises further gatherings and calls those connected to the circle to continue reaching for the highest. | The answers are already inside you. The questions just haven't caught up with the soul yet. |
| [Jesus Assigns Spirit Guides](messages/2019/01/2019-01-30-af-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑30 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem adds to a prior teaching on mediumship, addressing the mistaken belief that Jesus can be summoned to speak on demand and that any individual can claim him as their exclusive guide. He teaches that Jesus assigns guides from the Celestial Kingdom to work with mortals, that this is done in accordance with God's Will, and that humility and openness — rather than expectation — are the conditions for genuine angelic communication. | Jesus answers to God, not to expectation. The humble instrument who asks for nothing specific will always find an angel present. |
| [How Can a Person Receive Divine Love Without Knowing About It?](messages/2019/01/2019-01-31-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑31 | Two Paths | Core Teaching | Augustine answers how a soul can receive the Divine Love without any conscious understanding of its mechanisms, teaching that the mind need not grasp the laws of reception for the soul to long for God and be blessed. He explains that sincere souls of every religious background already receive this gift, often faintly, as a planted seed that may open more fully in the world of spirit, and he urges those gathered to reach such souls through love, acceptance, and example rather than insistence on belief. | You do not have to understand the gift to receive it. The soul knows how to long for God even when the mind has never heard His name. |
| [Reincarnation and the Perception of It Proliferated by Many Yogis and Gurus of the East](messages/2019/01/2019-01-31-af-yogananda.md) | Yogananda | Al Fike | 2019‑01‑31 | Two Paths, Letters from History | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Yogananda explains why so many people believe in reincarnation, tracing the experience to the Law of Attraction: spiritually sensitive souls draw spirits of like belief into such close rapport that the mortal feels they have been that spirit personality. He then recounts his own journey from a lifetime of yogic pursuit and deep belief in reincarnation to his meeting with Jesus in spirit, his reception of Divine Love, and his entry into the Celestial Heavens - testifying that the Divine Love path is far easier than the long and arduous natural love road. | There are no past lives. There are only souls who came very close, whose stories felt like your own. |
| [Come Together Again With Your Questions](messages/2019/02/2019-02-01-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑01 | Service & Mission |  | Confucius blesses the harmony the circle has built in prayer and urges them to gather again in the coming year to sit, contemplate, and formulate their questions and their desire for more truth. He reassures the circle host that she is not lost but set upon the path God designed for her purpose and service, that more souls will be drawn to the Light she builds within, and that many gifts are coming as the portal opens wide. | You think you may be lost. Confucius answers: no, you have gained the world of God, and the portal is opening wide. |
| [Faculties of the Soul](messages/2019/02/2019-02-01-af-josephus.md) | Josephus | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑01 | Prism of the Soul, Letters from History | Core Teaching | Josephus, a philosopher and teacher of the Jewish faith now in the Celestial Kingdom, delivers a structured teaching on the faculties of the soul, distinct from the material mind and held in chambers that God's Essence opens. He teaches that these faculties are unique to each soul, must be experienced rather than understood by the mind, and are refined and transformed when ignited by Divine Love. | You are using only half of what you are. The other half is a soul full of sealed chambers, and Divine Love is the light that opens them. |
| [We Lift You Up](messages/2019/02/2019-02-02-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑02 | Healing Path |  | Andrew lifts the circle up through the Portal of Light to a place where Love saturates the air and the soul drinks freely of God's blessing, comfort, and warmth. He tells them this gift is theirs whenever they ask for it in their Circles of Light, wherever they travel, and that the nurturing of the soul in Love will inform their work and send them upon their path of awakening, where they will flourish and come to know a deep peace and joy that becomes their strength and purpose. | There is a place where Love saturates the very air. The angels are lifting you toward it right now. |
| [The Door of Truth Is Opened With God's Love](messages/2019/02/2019-02-03-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑03 | Service & Mission |  | Andrew blesses the circle with a yearning for God's Love and the awakening of soul awareness, through which understanding of God's laws and creation comes to consciousness. He teaches that each soul carries particular gifts waiting to be awakened for service, and a God-bestowed purpose that is not revealed all at once but emerges slowly as the soul awakens, until one finds oneself walking a path in harmony with God's Will. He urges them to seek the highest with humility and patience, trusting that all will unfold in God's perfect timing. | You keep waiting for your purpose to arrive like a thunderclap. It is arriving the slow way, one awakening at a time. |
| [Blessings and Healings](messages/2019/02/2019-02-03-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑03 | Healing Path |  | Confucius brings a healing gift to the circle, a blessing to both the physical and the spiritual, that they may feel God's Touch and know the peace of His presence. He assures them they are given all they require to continue their spiritual progress, that God's Love flourishes within their souls, and that many angels attend to their needs and carry them through the conditions of this world in Light. | The same Touch that heals the body settles the soul into peace. Confucius brings both at once. |
| [The Light Must Overcome the Darkness](messages/2019/02/2019-02-04-af-jesus.md) | Jesus | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑04 | Jesus Speaks, Awakening Humanity | Core Teaching | Jesus describes two currents in the world, one toward darkness and one toward light, with darkness presently the stronger, fuelled by humanity's greed and misplaced search for safety in material things. He tells those who pray for Light that they carry a key, an antidote to the darkness, and that as they receive Divine Love the Light builds in their souls and spreads as beachheads and nodes that touch far more than they know. He calls them to be living examples and to teach that the truth of the soul is greater than the truth of the mind, within God's plan for the salvation of mankind. | Two currents run through the world, and the darker one is winning. Jesus says the antidote is already in your hands. |
| [Feeling the Love](messages/2019/02/2019-02-05-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑05 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Keea Atta Kem addresses why some souls feel the inflowing of Divine Love intensely while others barely sense it, explaining that years of living through the material mind can dull this sensitivity. She reassures the circle that not feeling the gift does not mean not receiving it, for the sincere yearning of the soul brings God's answer through the Law of Love. She promises that those who struggle with conscious awareness will, in time, be given some powerful experience or awakening that confirms the Truth, for nothing can hold God from reaching a sincere soul. | You pray and feel nothing, and wonder if anything is happening. Keea Atta Kem says the not-feeling is no measure of the gift. |
| [Your Prayers May Change the Conditions of the World](messages/2019/02/2019-02-06-af-francis-of-assisi.md) | Francis of Assisi | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑06 | Service & Mission |  | Francis of Assisi teaches that prayer is powerful enough to change the conditions of the world and even the behaviour of those living in ignorance and error, for as the circle asks the Creator for blessings of light, the minds of those in darkness may be awakened to truth and love. He calls them to release all resentment and barriers that add to the world's darkness, to be channels of love wherever they can, and to trust that God will open doors so that each may play their part in the plan for the salvation of mankind. | You cannot reach the hearts hardened against love. Francis says your prayers can go where you cannot. |
| [Choosing Light Over Darkness](messages/2019/02/2019-02-10-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑10 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that each day presents choices, and that the soul absorbs light or darkness according to what it chooses, building a condition it will carry into the world of spirit. He explains that the spirit world has many planes of light and darkness, and that the soul enters the plane matching its condition, where like surroundings reinforce it, making growth on Earth easier and richer in opportunity. He urges each soul to choose light and harmony and to ask in prayer for Divine Love, which heals the damage of life and awakens the soul for a journey of ever-increasing light. | Every choice you make is being absorbed by your soul. You are building the place where you will wake up next. |
| [God's Love Is the True Way to Liberation](messages/2019/02/2019-02-12-af-osho-bhagwan.md) | Osho Bhagwan | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑12 | Letters from History | Spirit Biography | Osho speaks from the spirit world, reflecting on his Earth life as a guru who taught the liberation of human passions and the awakening of human potential. He acknowledges that taming the passions is only one part of the journey, that he neglected to allow the Divine to truly guide him, and that his mission was partially successful but never complete. Having not yet entered the Celestial Spheres, his soul now yearns for the gift of Divine Love and he recognizes love as the true passion of the soul. He urges the circle not to hold back in awakening humanity to true liberation of the soul. | A guru who spent his life teaching liberation now says he missed the real one. Love was the passion he was looking for all along. |
| [The Experience of Pentecost](messages/2019/02/2019-02-15-af-matthew.md) | Matthew | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑15 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching, Spirit Biography | Asked to describe the Pentecost, Matthew gives a first-person account: it came suddenly and powerfully, in great light and heat like a fire that did not burn but healed and changed them, bringing relief, joy, and a closeness with God they had not known. He then teaches that many seekers yearn for this instantaneous awakening rather than the incremental and sometimes difficult journey of cleansing they have chosen, and assures them that freedom from their burdens will come. He urges them to go within for their answers and to listen to the beating of their souls, which yearns for God. | You keep praying for the fire to fall all at once. Matthew was there when it did, and still tells you to trust the slow climb. |
| [Process of Expiation](messages/2019/02/2019-02-16-mc-seretta-kem.md) | Seretta Kem | Maureen Cardoso | 2019‑02‑16 | Healing Path | Core Teaching | Seretta Kem explains the process of expiation, using one soul's recent experience, with her consent, as an example. He describes how the inflowing of Divine Love first brings warmth and joy, then loosens the conditions that inhibit the soul, surfacing buried pain, a stage when God can feel most distant though the angels are closest. He recounts a deep release that came when the angels called her into prayer with two others, followed by tears and a lasting peace. He assures all that these conditions are cleansed by the prayer for Divine Love, and that no soul is ever alone in the process. | When God feels furthest away, the angels are standing closest. They are not absent. They are letting the wound come up so it can leave. |
| [Be a Channel of Love](messages/2019/02/2019-02-18-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑18 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew reminds the circle that wherever they go and whomever they meet, they may be a channel of light, healing, love, and comfort simply by setting their sights on God and yearning for the Father's Love. He teaches that though the effects of these blessings may not be clear or obvious, they touch the souls of many around them, for it is the intention, desire, and yearning of an awakening soul that carries the blessing. He assures them that God desires to use them all in this way, and that they will be deeply changed by love. | You will never see most of the good you do. Andrew says do it anyway, for it lands in souls you will never know you touched. |
| [Be Receptive to God and the Celestial Angels](messages/2019/02/2019-02-18-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑18 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine teaches that God assigns an angel to each soul earnest in seeking Divine Love, but that to know this presence one must set aside the preconceptions and barriers of the mind and perceive through the faculties of the soul and heart. He explains that this awareness cannot be forced and unfolds uniquely for each person, so no one can tell another exactly how it will be. He encourages the circle to support one another against the loneliness of the path, and reminds them that while they cannot place this blessing within another soul, they may be channels of love who clear the way. | The angels are already with you. You miss them because you keep listening with your mind instead of your soul. |
| [It Is Your Destiny to Bring Your Gifts Forward for Mankind](messages/2019/02/2019-02-21-af-elijah.md) | Elijah | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑21 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Elijah, prophet of old, rejoices to see two gifted souls brought together in prayer and names each present a channel of God's love and truth. He teaches that laying a strong foundation of receiving the Father's Love with every breath allows one's gifts and purpose to unfold, and that God guides simply, through small inclinations rising from the soul to a willing mind. He calls these bonded souls to act, to serve as they are guided, and to stand as anchors of love for one another and for many others through the great changes coming upon the world. | God asks nothing grand of you today. Only that you listen for the small inclination rising in your soul, and act on it. |
| [Great Blessings Await Those Who Follow the Divine Love Path](messages/2019/02/2019-02-21-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑21 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus promises that those who take his hand and follow the path of God's Love will be led toward the Kingdom, awakened in their hearts, and blessed as God pours His Essence into their souls. He assures those who serve in humility, faith, and love that they will find opportunities to be his channels and will become teachers and healers, calling them his disciples and pledging to walk the path and pray alongside them always as they release their burdens and rise above the human condition. | Take my hand, Jesus says, and the road itself becomes the blessing. |
| [The Power to Change Needs Your Conscious Understanding of the Power of Free Will](messages/2019/02/2019-02-22-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑22 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches on the power of free will, reminding the group that God honours their choices absolutely and will not override them, even to relieve the pain those choices have caused. He explains that prayers for relief go unanswered when the mind keeps nurturing the very conditions it asks to be freed from, and that real change comes only when the desire for it rises from the soul, not the mind alone. He calls each soul to take responsibility, to look honestly at its own patterns, and to trust that God supplies the strength to change once that sincere desire is present. | You pray to be freed from the very thing you keep feeding. God is waiting for you to stop. |
| [Bring Joy to All that You Do](messages/2019/02/2019-02-22-af-goldie.md) | Goldie | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑22 |  |  | Goldie brings a warm, lighthearted counterpoint to a more serious teacher, urging the group to bring joy to everything they do and to see the journey not as a test but as a gift. She assures them that as their souls grow, joy and love grow with them through the Divine Love they receive, and promises to do her part to uplift them. | You call it a test. Goldie calls it a gift. The difference is where you look for the joy. |
| [Life Challenges Strengthen the Soul, Creating More Powerful Channels of Love](messages/2019/02/2019-02-22-af-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑22 |  |  | Keea Atta Kem encourages the group that every day brings both blessings and challenges, and that all of it conspires for their good, strengthening the soul and deepening their relationship with God. She teaches that every struggle is a blessing leading to greater light and joy, and calls each soul to walk humbly as a channel of love, trusting that God will use them to plant seeds in others who are not yet awake, since every soul will come to God in time. | The struggle you are enduring is not in the way of your awakening. It is the awakening. |
| [May You Come to Know God's Blessings](messages/2019/02/2019-02-23-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑23 | Healing Path |  | Confucius offers a short, tender blessing to the travelling group, wishing that they come to know the deep and wondrous blessings of God already within their souls. He assures them that he continues to bring healing to strengthen their bodies and help them navigate the challenges of the world. | The blessing you are hoping to receive is already in your soul. Confucius only asks that you come to know it. |
| [Each Uses Their Gifts to Help Each Other Heal](messages/2019/02/2019-02-24-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑24 | The Saints & Apostles Speak, Healing Path |  | Andrew speaks tenderly to a group about their differing healing journeys, explaining that one soul's inner work is nearly complete while others still guard tender places wounded long ago behind protective walls. He teaches that God brings His children together precisely because their gifts differ, so that what is obscured to one soul may come clear through another, and that the power of God's Love loosens the encrustations of life and draws them into shared healing. He assures them they are ready to cross the chasm into freedom. | The wound you have walled off is not yours to heal alone. God brought these others to you so what you cannot see, they can. |
| [We Use You to Teach Many Souls the Truth](messages/2019/02/2019-02-24-af-confucius.md) | Confucius | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑24 | Letters from History, Healing Path |  | Confucius speaks during the circle's healing sessions, promising continued healing to body, mind, and soul, and telling the group that God will bring seeking, hungering souls into their midst to be taught and comforted through them. He assures them that as they offer themselves as instruments of love, God will sustain both their spirit and physical bodies with waves of love and healing, increasing their faith, and that they carry the flame of the Father's Love to many. | God is already using your soul in ways you cannot see. Your task is only to keep walking, and let Him bring the ones who are seeking. |
| [Mary Brings Comfort for the Journey](messages/2019/02/2019-02-24-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑24 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary comes to bring comfort to those she calls her beloved charges, praying for their healing, upliftment, and deep peace on life's journeys. She assures them that as their souls long for God's blessing the light within will only increase, and that whatever debilitates and holds them down will fall away by the measure of their faith, prayer, and resolve, pushed aside by God and awakened in love. | The thing that holds you down is not as fixed as it feels. It falls away by the measure of your faith. |
| [Mediumship of Al and Ability to Communicate for All](messages/2019/02/2019-02-27-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑02‑27 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew speaks about the mediumship of the instrument through whom he speaks, describing how this soul was prepared over many years into a finely tuned, clear channel, and why clarity of reception depends on the medium's soul development in Divine Love rather than the ambitions of the mind. He then widens the teaching to all souls, assuring them that everyone accompanied by angels has some avenue of communication with spirit, that they are never alone, and that this rapport grows as they remain open and awaken in love. | The clear voice speaking through one prepared soul is not the only channel. Every soul has its own, if it will stay open. |
| [Seek the Counsel of Your Soul](messages/2019/03/2019-03-03-mc-keea-atta-kem.md) | Keea Atta Kem | Maureen Cardoso | 2019‑03‑03 |  |  | Keea Atta Kem, overseer of the online Circles of Light, teaches that beneath physical pain and mental turmoil lies a truth the soul longs to release, and that healing comes when one has the courage to look at it directly rather than letting the mind mask or control it. She counsels the circle to pray not only for a suffering friend's relief but for their courage to see that truth, and she urges each soul to make a regular practice of communing with the soul, befriending it so that mind and soul may work in harmony. | The pain is not the enemy. It is your soul asking you to look at something you have been unwilling to see. |
| [A Bridge Is Set Before You](messages/2019/03/2019-03-04-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑04 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine tells the group that a bridge is set before each of them, and that God, who respects free will, invites but never insists that they cross. He teaches that the first and greatest step is to accept the awakening of the soul through Divine Love, the one commitment from which all other blessings and gifts follow; without it the soul remains at its beginning point, however full the mind may be. He urges them to trust this truth and walk forward into a new journey that will set them free. | A bridge is set before you. God will not push you across it, and he will not stop waiting. |
| [The Highest Gift of All Is the Blessing of God's Love](messages/2019/03/2019-03-08-af-andrew.md) | Andrew | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑08 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Andrew teaches that the cold winds of earth buffet every soul, yet few reach out to God, and he urges the circle to seek the blessing of Divine Love and the help of their angel friends so they may stand firmly grounded in light. He frames the great choice before every soul: to follow the desires of the soul or to let the material mind keep precedence. Though God will guide every soul to light in some way, the higher blessing is the inflow of Divine Love that changes the soul irrevocably and opens the glories of the Celestial Heavens and the road to at-onement. | The winds of earth cannot topple a soul that is grounded in light. The only question is whether you will reach out. |
| [Blessings From God Are With You](messages/2019/03/2019-03-08-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑08 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Augustine blesses a small gathering, assuring them that as they come together love will flow, light will cascade down, and the peace that passes all understanding will touch their souls. He teaches that God uses these times together to awaken the gifts placed within each soul so that, returning home changed, they may free themselves and others; and he calls them to contribute to the flame by loving and praying for one another. He also prays for the healing of one among them. | The warmth in the room is not the room. It is the flame you carry, and God is asking you to feed it. |
| [There Is a Power to This Gift of Insight](messages/2019/03/2019-03-13-af-stephen.md) | Stephen | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑13 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Prophecy | Stephen tells the group that great changes are coming and that God is preparing each of them through dreams, portents, insights, and visions communicated by the soul, urging them not to dismiss these experiences. He teaches that this gift of insight is preparation for the work ahead, that the turmoil and cleansing they feel is a healing of the deep places within, and that God has chosen them to become rocks of strength and stability for those who will be lost amid the coming changes. | The dreams you are tempted to dismiss are God preparing you. When the time to act comes, you will already know. |
| [Love Is My Message](messages/2019/03/2019-03-14-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑14 | Jesus Speaks | Core Teaching | Jesus comes at the circle's call to give the heart of his teaching: that God is Love, that this Love is gifted to every soul who desires it, and that all truth is predicated upon love. He urges them to love all people regardless of belief, colour, or creed, to read the Bible with the heart since it holds both what he did and did not say, and clarifies that he is their brother and not God, though closest to God. He longs for the churches to be reformed and freed of error, and calls each soul to be a channel of God's Love in the world. | Do not pray to him. He is your brother, not your God. What he wants is for you to love the way he loved. |
| [Gather Your Brethren Into the Light](messages/2019/03/2019-03-14-af-mary.md) | Mary, Mother of Jesus | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑14 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mary comes with the light of her son to call the circle to the work of love: responding to need with generosity and grace, setting aside fear and bias to uplift others through food, counsel, comfort, or teaching. She tells them to gather their brothers and sisters, many of whom are in pain and confusion, and embrace them into the light, promising that as they seek to serve God in love their souls will awaken and all else will fall into place. | Seek to serve God in love, and all else falls into place. Start by gathering the ones in pain. |
| [Divine Love Brings Your Soul Nourishment Needed to Awaken](messages/2019/03/2019-03-29-af-mark.md) | Mark | Al Fike | 2019‑03‑29 | The Saints & Apostles Speak |  | Mark, guardian of the church where the circle gathers, welcomes them into a great beam of God's light and turns their attention to the soul: what it is, and why it remains a mystery to so many. He teaches that the soul is vast and full of facets and chambers that mostly lie unawakened, and that Divine Love is the nourishment that brings it to life. He calls each soul to step forward in faith and prayer, assuring them that any sincere effort brings untold blessings, and that those who open to God will help lead a changing world back toward harmony. | You live inside a mystery you have never explored: your own soul. Divine Love is what brings it to life. |
| [Birthday Prayer for Jeanne and Encouragement to All](messages/2019/04/2019-04-03-af-jesus.md) | Jesus of Nazareth | Al Fike | 2019‑04‑03 | Jesus Speaks |  | Jesus comes to a circle honouring one of their own on her birthday, affirming that the praise spoken of her is all true and more, for he sees her soul clearly as bright and beautiful, a servant of God who has uplifted many. He widens the blessing to all present, telling them they are lambs of God who each walk a unique path rather than follow as sheep, and calls them to be swept up in the Living Waters of God's Love so that the gifts within them awaken. He assures them they are his family and he will never leave them. | You are not a sheep in a flock. God gave you a path that is yours alone. Walk it. |
| [The Gift of Divine Love Is the Greatest Truth You May Know](messages/2019/04/2019-04-03-af-joseph.md) | Joseph | Al Fike | 2019‑04‑03 | The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Joseph, the earthly father of Jesus, testifies that during his Earth life he did not understand his son's mission or the power of God's Love to transform the soul. He proclaims that Jesus was the Messiah not only for the Jews but for all humanity, opening the doors to the gift of Divine Love. He teaches that the soul lies largely dormant without this gift, that receiving it awakens the chambers and potentials of the soul, and that in this one truth all other blessings, all doors, and all truth are opened. | The father of Jesus did not understand his son on Earth. He does now, and he has come to tell you what he missed. |
| [The Impediments of Soul Awakening](messages/2023/02/2023-02-10-af-augustine.md) | Augustine | Al Fike | 2023‑02‑10 | Awakening Humanity, Mind & Soul, The Saints & Apostles Speak | Core Teaching | Augustine teaches that humanity has been desensitized from childhood, its intuitive and emotional capacities trained away beneath intellect, distraction, and social conditioning, leaving people unable to feel their way to God. He corrects the notion that one must first cleanse all conditions before receiving God's Love: rather, prayer and longing draw in the Essence, which then strengthens the soul to face its buried feelings and clear the channel between mind and soul. | You were told you must clean yourself up before God will have you. Augustine says it is exactly the other way around. |
